example: She has a cat that she loves very much.
example_zh: 她有一隻她非常喜愛的貓。

example: He is able to speak three languages fluently.
example_zh: 他能夠流利地說三種語言。

example: This book is about a young girl's adventure.
example_zh: 這本書是關於一個年輕女孩的冒險。

example: The birds are flying above the tall trees.
example_zh: 鳥兒在高大的樹木上方飛翔。

example: My sister is studying abroad in Japan this year.
example_zh: 我姊姊今年在日本留學。

example: Tom was absent from school because he was sick.
example_zh: 湯姆因為生病而缺席上學。

example: She was happy to accept the job offer.
example_zh: 她很開心地接受了這份工作邀請。

example: There was a car accident near the school today.
example_zh: 今天學校附近發生了一起車禍意外。

example: My legs ache after the long walk yesterday.
example_zh: 昨天長途步行後我的腿很疼痛。

example: You can achieve your goals if you work hard.
example_zh: 如果你努力，就能達成你的目標。

example: They walked across the bridge to reach the park.
example_zh: 他們走過橋到達公園。

example: We must act quickly to solve this problem.
example_zh: 我們必須迅速行動來解決這個問題。

example: His quick action saved the child from danger.
example_zh: 他的迅速行動使孩子脫離了危險。

example: She is very active and enjoys playing sports daily.
example_zh: 她非常活躍，每天都喜歡運動。

example: Swimming is a great activity for staying healthy.
example_zh: 游泳是保持健康的好活動。

example: The young actor performed very well in the school play.
example_zh: 那位年輕的男演員在學校話劇中表現得非常好。

example: She is a famous actress who appears in many movies.
example_zh: 她是一位出現在許多電影中的著名女演員。

example: I thought the test was hard, but it was actually easy.
example_zh: 我以為這次考試很難，但實際上很簡單。

example: Please add some sugar to my coffee, thank you.
example_zh: 請在我的咖啡裡加些糖，謝謝。

example: Can you give me your home address for the letter?
example_zh: 你能把你的家庭地址給我寄信用嗎？

example: Many people admire her because she works very hard.
example_zh: 很多人欣賞她，因為她非常努力工作。

example: Only an adult can buy tickets for this movie.
example_zh: 只有成人才能購買這部電影的票。

example: I saw a funny advertisement for shoes on TV.
example_zh: 我在電視上看到一則關於鞋子的有趣廣告。

example: My teacher gave me good advice about my studies.
example_zh: 我的老師給了我關於學習的好建議。

example: The doctor advised me to drink more water every day.
example_zh: 醫生勸告我每天要多喝水。

example: Bad weather can affect your mood and energy levels.
example_zh: 壞天氣會影響你的心情和精力水平。

example: The little boy was afraid of the big dog.
example_zh: 那個小男孩害怕那隻大狗。

example: She always drinks a glass of milk after dinner.
example_zh: 她總是在晚餐後喝一杯牛奶。

example: We usually play basketball together on Sunday afternoon.
example_zh: 我們通常在星期天下午一起打籃球。

example: Please say that again because I did not hear you.
example_zh: 請再說一次，因為我沒有聽到你說的。

example: Most students voted against changing the school lunch menu.
example_zh: 大多數學生投票反對更改學校午餐菜單。

example: You must be over eighteen years of age to vote.
example_zh: 你必須年滿十八歲才能投票。

example: She moved to this city about five years ago.
example_zh: 她大約五年前搬到這個城市。

example: I agree with you that we should leave early.
example_zh: 我同意你說的，我們應該早點離開。

example: There is a big supermarket just ahead on the left.
example_zh: 左邊前方有一家大型超市。

example: The doctor gave first aid to the injured man.
example_zh: 醫生對受傷的男子進行了急救。

example: Scientists are still working hard to find a cure for AIDS.
example_zh: 科學家們仍在努力尋找愛滋病的治療方法。

example: Her aim is to become a nurse in the future.
example_zh: 她的目標是將來成為一名護士。

example: The air in the mountains is fresh and clean.
example_zh: 山上的空氣清新又乾淨。

example: Many airlines offer cheaper tickets if you book early.
example_zh: 許多航空公司提供提前訂票的優惠票價。

example: The airplane landed safely at the airport on time.
example_zh: 飛機準時安全地降落在機場。

example: We arrived at the airport two hours before departure.
example_zh: 我們在出發前兩小時抵達機場。

example: The fire alarm woke everyone up in the middle of the night.
example_zh: 火災警報在半夜把每個人都驚醒了。

example: She showed me her photo album from the summer trip.
example_zh: 她給我看了她夏季旅行的相簿。

example: The twin sisters look so alike that I cannot tell them apart.
example_zh: 這對雙胞胎姐妹看起來非常相像，我無法分辨她們。

example: The fish in the pond are still alive today.
example_zh: 池塘裡的魚今天還活著。

example: All the students finished their homework before class started.
example_zh: 所有學生在上課前都完成了作業。

example: My parents allow me to stay up until ten.
example_zh: 我的父母允許我待到十點才睡。

example: I almost missed the school bus this morning.
example_zh: 我今天早上幾乎錯過了校車。

example: She likes to read alone in her quiet room.
example_zh: 她喜歡獨自在安靜的房間裡閱讀。

example: We walked along the river after dinner last night.
example_zh: 我們昨晚飯後沿著河邊散步。

example: The teacher asked us to read the poem aloud.
example_zh: 老師要求我們大聲朗讀這首詩。

example: She has already eaten breakfast before you woke up.
example_zh: 在你醒來之前，她已經吃過早餐了。

example: He plays soccer and also enjoys swimming in summer.
example_zh: 他踢足球，夏天也喜歡游泳。

example: Although it was raining, we still went for a walk.
example_zh: 雖然在下雨，我們還是去散步了。

example: My grandmother always cooks a big meal on Sundays.
example_zh: 我的祖母總是在星期天做一頓豐盛的飯。

example: I am a student who loves learning new things.
example_zh: 我是一個喜歡學習新事物的學生。

example: America is a large country with many different cultures.
example_zh: 美國是一個擁有許多不同文化的大國。

example: My American friend taught me some new English words.
example_zh: 我的美國朋友教了我一些新的英語單字。

example: There is a small park among the tall buildings.
example_zh: 在高樓大廈之中有一座小公園。

example: A small amount of sugar makes the cake taste better.
example_zh: 少量的糖讓蛋糕嚐起來更好吃。

example: The ancient temple has stood for thousands of years.
example_zh: 這座古老的寺廟已矗立了數千年。

example: She bought bread and milk at the corner store.
example_zh: 她在街角的商店買了麵包和牛奶。

example: The little girl dressed as an angel for the party.
example_zh: 這個小女孩穿著天使裝去參加派對。

example: He took a deep breath to control his anger.
example_zh: 他深吸一口氣來控制自己的憤怒。

example: Take the photo from a different angle for better results.
example_zh: 從不同的角度拍照，效果會更好。

example: She was angry when her brother broke her favorite toy.
example_zh: 當她哥哥打破她最喜歡的玩具時，她很生氣。

example: The dog is my favorite animal in the world.
example_zh: 狗是我在世界上最喜歡的動物。

example: She hurt her ankle while playing basketball yesterday afternoon.
example_zh: 她昨天下午打籃球時扭傷了腳踝。

example: They went to a fancy restaurant for their wedding anniversary.
example_zh: 他們去一家高級餐廳慶祝結婚週年紀念日。

example: The teacher will announce the test results next Monday morning.
example_zh: 老師下週一早上將宣布考試成績。

example: Can I have another piece of chocolate cake please?
example_zh: 我可以再吃一塊巧克力蛋糕嗎？

example: Please answer the question before the class ends today.
example_zh: 請在今天課堂結束前回答這個問題。

example: A tiny ant carried a large piece of bread.
example_zh: 一隻小螞蟻搬運著一大塊麵包。

example: Do you have any questions about today's English lesson?
example_zh: 你對今天的英語課有任何問題嗎？

example: Is there anybody home who can help me?
example_zh: 家裡有任何人可以幫我嗎？

example: Does anyone know where the nearest bus stop is?
example_zh: 有任何人知道最近的公車站在哪裡嗎？

example: I am so hungry I could eat anything right now.
example_zh: 我現在餓到可以吃任何東西。

example: It was raining, but we went for a walk anyway.
example_zh: 雖然在下雨，我們還是去散步了。

example: I cannot find my keys anywhere in the house.
example_zh: 我在家裡任何地方都找不到我的鑰匙。

example: She lives in a small apartment near the city center.
example_zh: 她住在市中心附近的一間小公寓。

example: He called her to apologize for forgetting her birthday.
example_zh: 他打電話給她，為忘記她的生日道歉。

example: A rainbow began to appear after the rain stopped.
example_zh: 雨停後，一道彩虹開始出現。

example: She eats one apple every morning before going to school.
example_zh: 她每天早上去上學前都會吃一顆蘋果。

example: I really appreciate your help with my homework today.
example_zh: 我真的很感激你今天幫我寫作業。

example: The cherry blossoms usually bloom in April every year.
example_zh: 櫻花通常每年四月盛開。

example: There are many good restaurants in this area of town.
example_zh: 這個城鎮區域有很多好餐廳。

example: The two brothers often argue about which TV show to watch.
example_zh: 這兩兄弟常常為了看哪個電視節目而爭論。

example: She broke her arm when she fell off her bicycle.
example_zh: 她從腳踏車上摔下來時摔斷了手臂。

example: My grandfather loves reading in his old brown armchair.
example_zh: 我祖父喜歡坐在他那張舊棕色扶手椅上看書。

example: The army helped people after the big storm.
example_zh: 軍隊在大風暴過後幫助了人們。

example: There are many trees around our school building.
example_zh: 我們學校建築的周圍有很多棵樹。

example: Can you arrange the chairs before the meeting starts?
example_zh: 你能在會議開始之前把椅子安排好嗎？

example: We will arrive at the train station at noon.
example_zh: 我們將在中午抵達火車站。

example: The boy shot an arrow at the wooden target.
example_zh: 那個男孩朝木製靶子射出了一支箭。

example: She loves art and visits museums every weekend.
example_zh: 她熱愛藝術，每個週末都去參觀博物館。

example: I read an interesting article about space last night.
example_zh: 我昨晚讀了一篇關於太空的有趣文章。

example: The artist painted a beautiful picture of the sea.
example_zh: 那位藝術家畫了一幅美麗的海景畫。

example: She sings as beautifully as a professional singer.
example_zh: 她唱歌如同專業歌手一樣美妙。

example: Japan and China are both countries in Asia.
example_zh: 日本和中國都是位於亞洲的國家。

example: Asian food is popular in many countries around the world.
example_zh: 亞洲食物在世界上許多國家都非常受歡迎。

example: He stepped aside to let the old lady pass.
example_zh: 他站到旁邊，讓那位老太太先通過。

example: Please ask your teacher if you have any questions.
example_zh: 如果你有任何問題，請向你的老師詢問。

example: The baby was asleep before the story ended.
example_zh: 故事還沒講完，寶寶就已經睡著了。

example: The doctor's assistant helped me fill out the forms.
example_zh: 醫生的助理幫助我填寫了相關表格。

example: She is waiting at the bus stop for you.
example_zh: 她在公車站等著你。

example: The dog did not attack the small child.
example_zh: 那隻狗沒有攻擊那個小孩。

example: We will attend the school meeting this Friday.
example_zh: 我們這個星期五將參加學校會議。

example: Please pay attention to the teacher in class.
example_zh: 請在課堂上注意聽老師說話。

example: My birthday is in August, and I love it.
example_zh: 我的生日在八月，我很喜歡這個月份。

example: My aunt makes the best cookies in the world.
example_zh: 我阿姨做的餅乾是全世界最好吃的。

example: The leaves turn red and yellow in autumn.
example_zh: 秋天時樹葉會變成紅色和黃色。

example: You should avoid eating too much sugar every day.
example_zh: 你每天應該避免吃太多糖。

example: The baby is still awake at midnight tonight.
example_zh: 那個嬰兒今晚到午夜還醒著。

example: She walked away from the park feeling sad.
example_zh: 她心情難過地從公園走開。

example: The baby cried all night and kept us awake.
example_zh: 那個嬰兒整晚哭鬧，讓我們無法入睡。

example: He stepped back when he saw the big dog.
example_zh: 他看到那隻大狗時往後退了一步。

example: The little boy walked backward and then fell down.
example_zh: 那個小男孩倒退著走，然後就跌倒了。

example: Eating too much junk food is bad for you.
example_zh: 吃太多垃圾食物對你的健康不好。

example: We play badminton in the park every weekend.
example_zh: 我們每個週末都在公園打羽毛球。

example: She put all her books into her school bag.
example_zh: 她把所有的書放進她的書包裡。

example: My mom likes to bake cookies on the weekend.
example_zh: 我媽媽喜歡在週末烘焙餅乾。

example: There is a small bakery near my house.
example_zh: 我家附近有一家小麵包店。

example: She watered the plants on her balcony every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上在陽台上澆花。

example: The children played with a red ball in the park.
example_zh: 孩子們在公園裡玩一顆紅球。

example: The little girl let go of her yellow balloon.
example_zh: 小女孩放開了她的黃色氣球。

example: He eats a banana every morning for breakfast.
example_zh: 他每天早上吃一根香蕉當早餐。

example: The school band played music at the parade.
example_zh: 學校樂團在遊行中演奏音樂。

example: She went to the bank to save her money.
example_zh: 她去銀行存她的錢。

example: We had a barbecue in the garden last Saturday.
example_zh: 上個星期六我們在花園裡烤肉。

example: My dad goes to the barber every two weeks.
example_zh: 我爸爸每兩週去理髮師那裡剪一次頭髮。

example: The dog began to bark loudly at the stranger.
example_zh: 那隻狗開始對陌生人大聲吠叫。

example: A strong base is important for learning any language.
example_zh: 扎實的基礎對學習任何語言都很重要。

example: He watches baseball games on TV every weekend.
example_zh: 他每個週末在電視上看棒球比賽。

example: They store old boxes in the basement of the house.
example_zh: 他們把舊箱子存放在房子的地下室裡。

example: You need basic cooking skills to make a meal.
example_zh: 你需要基本的烹飪技巧才能做一頓飯。

example: She put the apples into a large wicker basket.
example_zh: 她把蘋果放進一個大柳條籃子裡。

example: My brother plays basketball with his friends every weekend.
example_zh: 我哥哥每個週末都和朋友打籃球。

example: The boy hit the ball hard with his bat.
example_zh: 那個男孩用球棒用力地打了那顆球。

example: She takes a warm bath every evening before bed.
example_zh: 她每天晚上睡前都會泡一個溫水澡。

example: The children like to bathe in the river on hot days.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在炎熱的天氣裡到河裡洗澡。

example: There is only one bathroom in our small apartment.
example_zh: 我們小公寓裡只有一間浴室。

example: The soldiers fought a long and difficult battle together.
example_zh: 士兵們一起打了一場漫長而艱難的戰役。

example: She wants to be a doctor when she grows up.
example_zh: 她長大後想成為一名醫生。

example: We love to walk along the beach in summer.
example_zh: 我們喜歡在夏天沿著海灘散步。

example: My mother always adds a few beans to the soup.
example_zh: 我媽媽總是在湯裡加一些豆子。

example: A large brown bear was walking near the forest.
example_zh: 一隻大棕熊正在森林附近行走。

example: My father grew a long beard during the winter months.
example_zh: 我父親在冬天幾個月裡留了一把長鬍鬚。

example: Our school team beat the other team by ten points.
example_zh: 我們學校的隊伍以十分擊敗了對方隊伍。

example: The flowers in the garden look beautiful in spring.
example_zh: 花園裡的花在春天看起來非常美麗。

example: The beauty of the flowers made everyone smile.
example_zh: 花朵的美麗讓每個人都微笑了。

example: She stayed home because it was raining outside.
example_zh: 她待在家裡，因為外面在下雨。

example: He worked hard to become a good doctor.
example_zh: 他努力工作，想要成為一名好醫生。

example: I go to bed at ten every night.
example_zh: 我每晚十點上床睡覺。

example: Her bedroom has a large window and a desk.
example_zh: 她的臥室有一扇大窗戶和一張書桌。

example: A bee landed on the flower and collected nectar.
example_zh: 一隻蜜蜂停在花上採集花蜜。

example: My mother cooked beef and vegetables for dinner tonight.
example_zh: 我媽媽今晚為晚餐煮了牛肉和蔬菜。

example: My dad sometimes drinks a cold beer after work.
example_zh: 我爸爸有時下班後喝一杯冰啤酒。

example: Please wash your hands before you eat your meal.
example_zh: 請在吃飯之前洗手。

example: The teacher asked us to begin the test now.
example_zh: 老師要求我們現在開始考試。

example: This yoga class is perfect for a beginner like me.
example_zh: 這個瑜伽課對像我這樣的初學者非常合適。

example: The children behaved very well during the long trip.
example_zh: 孩子們在漫長的旅途中表現得非常好。

example: The cat is hiding behind the big red sofa.
example_zh: 那隻貓躲在大紅色沙發後面。

example: I believe you can pass the exam with practice.
example_zh: 我相信你透過練習可以通過考試。

example: The school bell rang and all the students left.
example_zh: 學校的鈴聲響了，所有學生都離開了。

example: These books belong to the school library.
example_zh: 這些書屬於學校圖書館。

example: The temperature dropped below zero last night.
example_zh: 昨晚氣溫降到零度以下。

example: He wore a brown leather belt with his jeans.
example_zh: 他穿牛仔褲時繫著一條棕色皮帶。

example: The old man sat on a bench in the park.
example_zh: 那位老人坐在公園的長椅上。

example: She placed her bag beside the chair.
example_zh: 她把包包放在椅子旁邊。

example: I don't like that restaurant; besides, it's too expensive.
example_zh: 我不喜歡那家餐廳；此外，它太貴了。

example: This new phone has a better camera than my old one.
example_zh: 這支新手機的相機比我舊的好。

example: The café is located between the bank and the bookstore.
example_zh: 那家咖啡廳位於銀行和書店之間。

example: The mountain view was beyond my expectations.
example_zh: 山景超出了我的預期。

example: She rides her bicycle to school every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上騎腳踏車去學校。

example: They live in a big house near the river.
example_zh: 他們住在河邊的一棟大房子裡。

example: My brother got a new bike for his birthday.
example_zh: 我哥哥生日時得到了一輛新腳踏車。

example: The waiter brought the bill at the end of dinner.
example_zh: 服務生在晚餐結束時拿來了帳單。

example: A small bird was singing outside my window this morning.
example_zh: 今天早上有一隻小鳥在我窗外唱歌。

example: The birth of her baby brought great joy to the family.
example_zh: 她孩子的出生為全家帶來了極大的喜悅。

example: We had a big party for her birthday last Saturday.
example_zh: 我們上週六為她的生日舉辦了一個大派對。

example: Can you wait just a bit? I am almost ready.
example_zh: 你能稍等一下嗎？我快好了。

example: The dog will bite you if you get too close.
example_zh: 如果你靠太近，那隻狗會咬你。

example: This coffee is too bitter for me to drink.
example_zh: 這杯咖啡對我來說太苦了，喝不下去。

example: She wore a black dress to the dinner party.
example_zh: 她穿著一件黑色洋裝去參加晚宴。

example: The teacher wrote the new words on the blackboard.
example_zh: 老師把新單字寫在黑板上。

example: You should not blame others for your own mistakes.
example_zh: 你不應該因為自己的錯誤而責備別人。

example: Please fill in the blank spaces on this form.
example_zh: 請填寫這份表格上的空白處。

example: She covered the sleeping baby with a soft blanket.
example_zh: 她用一條柔軟的毯子蓋在熟睡的寶寶身上。

example: The blind man used a white stick to walk.
example_zh: 那位盲人用白色手杖走路。

example: The school is just one block away from here.
example_zh: 學校距離這裡只有一個街區。

example: The doctor said he needed to check my blood.
example_zh: 醫生說他需要檢查我的血液。

example: She bought a pretty pink blouse at the market.
example_zh: 她在市場買了一件漂亮的粉紅色女襯衫。

example: Please blow out all the candles on your cake.
example_zh: 請把蛋糕上所有的蠟燭都吹熄。

example: The sky is very blue on a sunny day.
example_zh: 晴天的天空非常藍。

example: The teacher wrote the answer on the board.
example_zh: 老師把答案寫在黑板上。

example: We took a small boat to the island.
example_zh: 我們搭乘一艘小船去那座島。

example: Exercise every day to keep your body healthy.
example_zh: 每天運動以保持身體健康。

example: Please boil some water for the hot tea.
example_zh: 請燒一些水來泡熱茶。

example: The police found a bomb near the old building.
example_zh: 警察在舊建築附近發現了一顆炸彈。

example: The dog was chewing on a big bone.
example_zh: 那隻狗正在啃一根大骨頭。

example: She reads a book every night before sleeping.
example_zh: 她每晚睡前都會讀一本書。

example: He put all his books in the bookcase.
example_zh: 他把所有的書都放進書櫃裡。

example: I bought two new books at the bookstore.
example_zh: 我在書店買了兩本新書。

example: She felt bored because there was nothing to do.
example_zh: 她感到無聊，因為沒有任何事可做。

example: The long movie was so boring I fell asleep.
example_zh: 那部電影太令人厭煩了，我睡著了。

example: My little sister was born in the spring.
example_zh: 我的妹妹是在春天出生的。

example: Can I borrow your pen for a moment?
example_zh: 我可以借用你的筆一下嗎？

example: Her boss gave her a new task today.
example_zh: 她的老闆今天給了她一項新任務。

example: Both of my parents love cooking at home.
example_zh: 我的父母兩人都喜歡在家做飯。

example: Please don't bother me while I am studying.
example_zh: 我在讀書時請不要打擾我。

example: She drinks a bottle of water every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上喝一瓶水。

example: The keys were at the bottom of her bag.
example_zh: 鑰匙在她包包的底部。

example: The actor bowed to the audience after the show.
example_zh: 演員在表演結束後向觀眾鞠躬。

example: He ate a bowl of hot soup for lunch.
example_zh: 他午餐吃了一碗熱湯。

example: We went bowling with our friends last Saturday.
example_zh: 我們上週六和朋友去打保齡球。

example: She put all her old photos in a box.
example_zh: 她把所有舊照片放進一個盒子裡。

example: The little boy is playing with a red ball.
example_zh: 那個小男孩正在玩一顆紅球。

example: Getting enough sleep is good for your brain.
example_zh: 充足的睡眠對你的腦有益。

example: The bird sat quietly on a branch of the tree.
example_zh: 那隻鳥靜靜地坐在樹枝上。

example: The brave girl helped the lost child find his mother.
example_zh: 那個勇敢的女孩幫助迷路的孩子找到了他的媽媽。

example: My mother buys fresh bread from the bakery every day.
example_zh: 我媽媽每天都從麵包店買新鮮麵包。

example: Let's take a short break before we continue working.
example_zh: 讓我們在繼續工作之前先休息一下。

example: She always eats eggs and toast for breakfast.
example_zh: 她早餐總是吃雞蛋和吐司。

example: The old house was built with red bricks.
example_zh: 那棟老房子是用紅磚建造的。

example: We crossed the old bridge to reach the other side.
example_zh: 我們越過那座舊橋抵達對岸。

example: The sun is very bright on a clear summer day.
example_zh: 在晴朗的夏日，太陽非常明亮。

example: Please bring your textbook to class tomorrow morning.
example_zh: 請明天早上帶你的課本來上課。

example: The broad river flows slowly through the green valley.
example_zh: 這條寬廣的河流緩緩流過綠色的山谷。

example: My brother and I often play basketball after school.
example_zh: 我和我哥哥放學後經常一起打籃球。

example: She has long brown hair and big blue eyes.
example_zh: 她有一頭棕色長髮和一雙大藍眼睛。

example: We had brunch at a café near the park.
example_zh: 我們在公園附近的咖啡廳吃了早午餐。

example: Remember to brush your teeth before going to bed.
example_zh: 記得在睡覺前刷牙。

example: He filled the bucket with water to wash the car.
example_zh: 他把水桶裝滿水來洗車。

example: The hotel offers a buffet breakfast every morning for guests.
example_zh: 這間飯店每天早上為住客提供自助早餐。

example: A small bug was sitting on the green leaf.
example_zh: 一隻小蟲停在綠色的葉子上。

example: They plan to build a new school in our town.
example_zh: 他們計畫在我們鎮上建造一所新學校。

example: The tall building near the station has twenty floors.
example_zh: 車站附近那棟高樓有二十層樓。

example: Be careful not to burn your hand on the stove.
example_zh: 小心不要在爐子上燙傷你的手。

example: I take the bus to school every day at seven.
example_zh: 我每天七點搭公車去上學。

example: My uncle runs a small business selling fresh fruit.
example_zh: 我叔叔經營一家賣新鮮水果的小生意。

example: The businessman traveled to many countries for his work.
example_zh: 這位商人為了工作去了很多國家。

example: She is too busy to join us for lunch today.
example_zh: 她今天太忙碌了，無法和我們一起吃午餐。

example: I wanted to go outside, but it started to rain.
example_zh: 我想出去，但是開始下雨了。

example: She spread some butter on her toast this morning.
example_zh: 她今天早上在吐司上塗了一些奶油。

example: A colorful butterfly landed on the flower in the garden.
example_zh: 一隻色彩繽紛的蝴蝶停在花園裡的花上。

example: One button on his shirt fell off at school today.
example_zh: 他的一顆鈕扣今天在學校掉了。

example: Let's buy some fresh vegetables at the market tomorrow.
example_zh: 我們明天去市場買一些新鮮蔬菜吧。

example: She learned English by watching movies every day.
example_zh: 她藉由每天看電影來學英文。

example: He waved and said bye before getting on the bus.
example_zh: 他揮手說再見，然後上了公車。

example: My mother cooks cabbage soup for dinner every week.
example_zh: 我媽媽每週都煮高麗菜湯當晚餐。

example: The workers fixed the broken cable under the road.
example_zh: 工人們修好了路下方壞掉的電纜。

example: We always eat lunch together in the school cafeteria.
example_zh: 我們總是在學校自助餐廳一起吃午飯。

example: The bird sang happily inside its small cage at home.
example_zh: 那隻鳥在家裡的小籠子裡快樂地唱歌。

example: She baked a chocolate cake for her friend's birthday party.
example_zh: 她為朋友的生日派對烤了一個巧克力蛋糕。

example: I check my calendar every morning to plan my day.
example_zh: 我每天早上查看日曆來規劃我的一天。

example: She called her mother to wish her a happy birthday.
example_zh: 她打電話給媽媽，祝她生日快樂。

example: Please stay calm and listen carefully to the teacher.
example_zh: 請保持冷靜，仔細聆聽老師說話。

example: A camel can walk for days without drinking water.
example_zh: 駱駝不喝水可以走好幾天的路。

example: He used his camera to take photos of the sunset.
example_zh: 他用相機拍下了夕陽的照片。

example: We camped near the river and cooked over a fire.
example_zh: 我們在河邊露營，並在火上烹飪食物。

example: She can speak three different languages very well.
example_zh: 她能說三種不同的語言，說得很好。

example: Canada is a large country with beautiful mountains and lakes.
example_zh: 加拿大是一個擁有美麗山脈和湖泊的大國。

example: She lit a candle when the lights went out.
example_zh: 燈熄滅時，她點燃了一根蠟燭。

example: The children ate too much candy and felt sick.
example_zh: 孩子們吃了太多糖果，感到不舒服。

example: He wore a red cap to protect his head from the sun.
example_zh: 他戴著一頂紅色帽子來遮擋陽光。

example: Taipei is the capital and largest city of Taiwan.
example_zh: 台北是台灣的首都，也是最大的城市。

example: The captain led the team to win the championship game.
example_zh: 隊長帶領球隊贏得了冠軍賽。

example: My father drives his car to work every morning.
example_zh: 我父親每天早上開車去上班。

example: She sent a birthday card to her best friend.
example_zh: 她寄了一張生日卡片給她最好的朋友。

example: She really cares about her friends and family.
example_zh: 她非常在乎她的朋友和家人。

example: Please be careful when you cross the busy street.
example_zh: 過繁忙的街道時，請要小心。

example: He made a careless mistake on the math test.
example_zh: 他在數學考試中犯了一個粗心的錯誤。

example: My mom puts a carrot in the vegetable soup.
example_zh: 我媽媽在蔬菜湯裡放了一根胡蘿蔔。

example: Can you help me carry these heavy bags home?
example_zh: 你能幫我把這些重袋子帶回家嗎？

example: She pushed the cart around the supermarket to shop.
example_zh: 她推著手推車在超市裡購物。

example: My little brother watches a cartoon every Saturday morning.
example_zh: 我弟弟每個星期六早上都看卡通。

example: The teacher used a real case to explain the rule.
example_zh: 老師用一個真實的案例來解釋這條規則。

example: I don't have enough cash to buy that book.
example_zh: 我沒有足夠的現金來買那本書。

example: My grandfather still has old cassette tapes at home.
example_zh: 我爺爺家裡還留有舊的卡式錄音帶。

example: The old castle on the hill looks very beautiful.
example_zh: 山丘上的舊城堡看起來非常美麗。

example: Our cat likes to sleep on the warm sofa.
example_zh: 我們的貓喜歡睡在溫暖的沙發上。

example: The boy tried to catch the ball with both hands.
example_zh: 那個男孩試著用雙手接住球。

example: Eating too much sugar can cause health problems later.
example_zh: 吃太多糖之後可能會造成健康問題。

example: There is a big lamp hanging from the ceiling.
example_zh: 天花板上掛著一盞大燈。

example: We celebrate my birthday with cake and songs.
example_zh: 我們用蛋糕和歌曲慶祝我的生日。

example: She uses her cellphone to call her mom every day.
example_zh: 她每天用手機打電話給她媽媽。

example: The candy costs only twenty-five cents at the store.
example_zh: 那顆糖果在商店裡只要二十五分錢。

example: The library is in the center of our town.
example_zh: 圖書館位於我們鎮的中心。

example: The baby grew two centimeters taller this month.
example_zh: 這個嬰兒這個月長高了兩公分。

example: The central park is a great place to relax.
example_zh: 中央公園是一個放鬆的好地方。

example: Many great changes happened in the last century.
example_zh: 上個世紀發生了許多重大的變化。

example: I eat a bowl of cereal for breakfast every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上吃一碗穀類食品當早餐。

example: She is certain that she left her bag at home.
example_zh: 她確定她把包包留在家裡了。

example: Please sit on the chair next to the window.
example_zh: 請坐在窗戶旁邊的椅子上。

example: The teacher used chalk to write on the blackboard.
example_zh: 老師用粉筆在黑板上寫字。

example: You should take this chance to learn something new.
example_zh: 你應該把握這個機會學習新事物。

example: The weather can change very quickly in spring.
example_zh: 春天的天氣變化可能非常快。

example: My favorite channel shows cartoons every Saturday morning.
example_zh: 我最喜歡的頻道每個星期六早上播卡通。

example: The main character in this story is very brave.
example_zh: 這個故事中的主角非常勇敢。

example: The hotel charges fifty dollars for each extra night.
example_zh: 這間旅館每多住一晚收取五十美元。

example: The teacher showed a chart of the world's weather.
example_zh: 老師展示了一張世界氣候圖表。

example: The dog chased the cat around the garden yesterday.
example_zh: 那隻狗昨天在花園裡追著貓跑。

example: This shirt is very cheap, so I bought two.
example_zh: 這件襯衫很便宜，所以我買了兩件。

example: You should never cheat on a test at school.
example_zh: 你在學校考試時絕對不應該作弊。

example: Please check your answers before you hand in the paper.
example_zh: 請在交卷前檢查你的答案。

example: The fans cheered loudly when their team scored a goal.
example_zh: 當球隊進球時，球迷們大聲歡呼。

example: She put some cheese on her sandwich for lunch.
example_zh: 她在午餐的三明治上放了一些起司。

example: The chef cooked a delicious meal for all the guests.
example_zh: 廚師為所有賓客烹製了一頓美味的餐點。

example: Chemistry class can be fun when you do experiments.
example_zh: 做實驗的時候，化學課可以很有趣。

example: My grandfather taught me how to play chess last year.
example_zh: 我祖父去年教我怎麼下西洋棋。

example: He felt a sharp pain in his chest after running.
example_zh: 跑步後他感到胸部一陣刺痛。

example: My mother cooked chicken with vegetables for dinner tonight.
example_zh: 我媽媽今晚做了雞肉和蔬菜當晚餐。

example: The chief reason we left early was the heavy rain.
example_zh: 我們提早離開的主要原因是大雨。

example: Every child in the class got a prize today.
example_zh: 班上的每個小孩今天都獲得了獎品。

example: She has many happy memories from her childhood.
example_zh: 她有許多來自童年的快樂回憶。

example: It is childish to cry when you lose a game.
example_zh: 輸了比賽就哭是很幼稚的行為。

example: He hurt his chin when he fell off his bike.
example_zh: 他從腳踏車上摔下來時傷到了下巴。

example: China is a very large country in Asia.
example_zh: 中國是亞洲一個非常大的國家。

example: She is learning to speak Chinese at school.
example_zh: 她正在學校學習說中文。

example: I bought a box of chocolate for my mom.
example_zh: 我為我媽媽買了一盒巧克力。

example: Making the right choice is not always easy.
example_zh: 做出正確的選擇並不總是容易的。

example: You can choose any book from the shelf.
example_zh: 你可以從書架上選擇任何一本書。

example: She learned to use chopsticks when she visited Japan.
example_zh: 她去日本旅遊時學會了使用筷子。

example: Our family always decorates a tree for Christmas.
example_zh: 我們家每年都會為聖誕節裝飾一棵樹。

example: The old church in our town is very beautiful.
example_zh: 我們鎮上那座古老的教堂非常美麗。

example: The children sat in a circle and sang songs.
example_zh: 孩子們圍成一個圓圈坐下來唱歌。

example: New York is a very busy and exciting city.
example_zh: 紐約是一座非常繁忙且令人興奮的城市。

example: The audience began to clap at the end of the show.
example_zh: 表演結束時，觀眾開始鼓掌。

example: There are thirty students in my English class.
example_zh: 我的英語課班上有三十名學生。

example: My classmate helped me with the math homework yesterday.
example_zh: 我的同學昨天幫我完成數學作業。

example: The classroom has twenty desks and a big whiteboard.
example_zh: 教室裡有二十張課桌和一個大白板。

example: Please clean your room before your friends come over.
example_zh: 請在朋友來之前把你的房間打掃乾淨。

example: The teacher gave a clear explanation of the new lesson.
example_zh: 老師對新課程給了清楚的解釋。

example: The clerk at the store helped me find the right size.
example_zh: 商店裡的店員幫我找到了合適的尺寸。

example: She is a clever girl who always solves problems quickly.
example_zh: 她是一個聰明的女孩，總是能快速解決問題。

example: The climate in Taiwan is warm and humid all year.
example_zh: 台灣的氣候全年溫暖潮濕。

example: We climbed the mountain and enjoyed the beautiful view together.
example_zh: 我們爬上山頂，一起欣賞美麗的景色。

example: The clock on the wall shows it is three o'clock.
example_zh: 牆上的時鐘顯示現在是三點鐘。

example: Please close the window because it is getting cold outside.
example_zh: 請關上窗戶，因為外面越來越冷了。

example: She put her new dress in the closet carefully.
example_zh: 她小心地把新裙子放進衣櫥裡。

example: He used a soft cloth to clean the dirty table.
example_zh: 他用一塊軟布擦拭髒桌子。

example: She packed her clothes in a bag for the trip.
example_zh: 她把衣服打包放進袋子裡準備旅行。

example: A big white cloud was floating slowly across the blue sky.
example_zh: 一朵大白雲緩緩地飄過藍色的天空。

example: It was cloudy this morning, so we did not go hiking.
example_zh: 今天早上天空多雲，所以我們沒有去爬山。

example: She joined the school club to meet new friends.
example_zh: 她加入了學校社團，為了認識新朋友。

example: The coach told the team to practice every day.
example_zh: 教練告訴隊員們每天都要練習。

example: We drove along the coast and enjoyed the view.
example_zh: 我們沿著海岸開車，欣賞沿途風景。

example: Please wear a coat because it is cold outside.
example_zh: 請穿外套，因為外面很冷。

example: She saw a cockroach in the kitchen last night.
example_zh: 她昨晚在廚房看到了一隻蟑螂。

example: He drinks a cup of coffee every morning.
example_zh: 他每天早上喝一杯咖啡。

example: I found an old coin under the sofa today.
example_zh: 我今天在沙發下面發現了一枚舊硬幣。

example: She ordered a coke with her burger at lunch.
example_zh: 她午餐時點了一杯可樂配漢堡。

example: It is very cold outside, so wear your jacket.
example_zh: 外面很冷，所以要穿外套。

example: My brother likes to collect stamps from different countries.
example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡收集來自不同國家的郵票。

example: She wants to study science at a good college.
example_zh: 她想在一所好大學學習自然科學。

example: My favorite color is blue because it looks calm.
example_zh: 我最喜歡的顏色是藍色，因為看起來很平靜。

example: The market is colorful with flowers, fruits, and clothes.
example_zh: 市場裡有花、水果和衣服，非常多采多姿。

example: Please comb your hair before you leave the house.
example_zh: 出門前請先梳頭髮。

example_zh: 你今天放學後可以來我家嗎？

example: This sofa is very comfortable to sit on after work.
example_zh: 這張沙發在下班後坐起來非常舒適。

example: The comic book made all the children laugh out loud.
example_zh: 這本漫畫書讓所有孩子都大聲笑了出來。

example: Cats and dogs are common pets in many families.
example_zh: 貓和狗是許多家庭中常見的寵物。

example: She works for a big company in the city.
example_zh: 她在城市裡的一家大公司工作。

example: He likes to compare prices before buying anything online.
example_zh: 他喜歡在網路購物前先比較價格。

example: Please complete the form before you submit your application.
example_zh: 請在提交申請前先填完這份表格。

example_zh: 她每天晚上用電腦做功課。

example: She felt confident before giving her speech at school.
example_zh: 她在學校演講前感到非常有信心。

example: The long instructions confused me and I gave up.
example_zh: 那冗長的說明讓我感到困惑，我就放棄了。

example: We all congratulated her on winning the spelling contest.
example_zh: 我們都恭喜她贏得了拼字比賽。

example: You should consider taking a break when you feel tired.
example_zh: 你應該考慮在感到疲倦時休息一下。

example_zh: 如果你有任何問題，請聯絡我。

example_zh: 她考試不及格後決定繼續用功讀書。

example_zh: 我家附近的商店購物非常方便。

example_zh: 我們聊了很長時間，談到了週末的計畫。

example_zh: 放學後她給了我一塊熱騰騰的巧克力豆餅乾。

example_zh: 請立刻把這個句子抄寫到你的筆記本裡。

example_zh: 街角有一家小咖啡廳。

example_zh: 你在考試中所有的答案都是正確的。

example_zh: 這件藍色夾克在店裡要多少錢？

example_zh: 這件白色襯衫是用柔軟的棉布製成的。

example_zh: 他喝了冷水之後開始嚴重地咳嗽。

example_zh: 我年輕的時候能跑得非常快。

example_zh: 老師要我們從一數到二十。

example_zh: 日本是一個美麗的國家，有很多有趣的地方值得參觀。

example_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在公園裡手牽著手散步。

example_zh: 她有勇氣在所有人面前發言。

example_zh: 我這學期正在上一門線上英語課程。

example_zh: 法官要求所有人在法庭中保持安靜。

example_zh: 我的表兄住在台中，每年夏天都會來拜訪我們。

example_zh: 請把食物蓋起來，這樣就不會變冷。

example_zh: 農夫每天早上餵他的母牛新鮮的草。

example_zh: 牛仔騎著馬穿越乾燥的沙漠土地。

example_zh: 我們昨天下午在海灘抓到了一隻大螃蟹。

example_zh: 聽起來很瘋狂，但他冒雨走路去上學。

example_zh: 她睡前會在臉上擦乳霜。

example_zh: 學生們合作創造了一幅美麗的牆面畫作。

example_zh: 他用信用卡買了一支新手機。

example_zh: 從商店偷東西是犯罪行為，是不被允許的。

example: Look both ways before you cross the busy street safely.
example_zh: 在安全穿越繁忙的街道前，先看清兩側來車。

example_zh: 一大群人聚集在公園裡觀看表演。

example: The subway is always crowded during the morning rush hour.
example_zh: 地鐵在早晨尖峰時段總是非常擁擠。

example: It is cruel to leave animals outside in cold weather.
example_zh: 把動物留在寒冷的戶外是很殘忍的。

example_zh: 那個小女孩弄丟玩具後開始哭了起來。

example: She enjoys learning about the culture of different countries.
example_zh: 她喜歡學習不同國家的文化。

example_zh: 她在睡前喝了一杯溫熱的茶。

example_zh: 醫生們正努力尋找治癒這種疾病的方法。

example_zh: 那個好奇的孩子問了許多關於星星的問題。

example_zh: 目前的天氣太熱，不適合進行戶外活動。

example_zh: 請把窗簾關上，這樣陽光就不會照進來。

example_zh: 那位親切的顧客向服務生道謝，感謝他的好服務。

example_zh: 她用剪刀把紙剪成小塊。

example_zh: 每個人看到那隻可愛的熊貓寶寶都笑了。

example_zh: 運動是她每日早晨例行公事的重要一部分。

example_zh: 他們在學校舞會上一起學習跳舞。

example_zh: 告示牌警告人們注意河邊的危險。

example_zh: 獨自在海裡游泳是很危險的。

example_zh: 房間太暗了，我沒辦法閱讀。

example_zh: 你的生日派對是哪個日期？

example_zh: 他們的女兒今天第一次開始上學。

example_zh: 我們一起在海灘度過了一整天。

example_zh: 這棵植物死了，因為沒有人澆水。

example_zh: 她是聾的，但用手語溝通得很好。

example_zh: 我們先處理完作業，再看電視。

example_zh: 她總是用「親愛的朋友」來開始她的信。

example_zh: 他的狗的死亡讓他非常難過。

example: Christmas is celebrated on the twenty-fifth of December.
example_zh: 聖誕節在十二月二十五日慶祝。

example_zh: 我們需要決定晚餐要去哪裡吃。

example: Making a good decision takes time and careful thought.
example_zh: 做出一個好的決定需要時間和仔細思考。

example_zh: 他們每年聖誕節都用燈飾裝飾房子。

example_zh: 這個湖非常深，游泳時要小心。

example_zh: 我們今天看到一隻鹿在森林裡奔跑。

example: She got a degree in English from the university.
example_zh: 她從大學取得了英文學位。

example: The apple pie my mom made was very delicious.
example_zh: 我媽媽做的蘋果派非常美味。

example: The postman will deliver the package to your door.
example_zh: 郵差會把包裹送到你家門口。

example_zh: 我每年去看兩次牙醫。

example_zh: 她在公司的業務部門工作。

example: Plants depend on sunlight and water to grow well.
example_zh: 植物依賴陽光和水才能長得好。

example_zh: 你能描述一下你昨晚看到的那個男人嗎？

example: The Sahara Desert is one of the hottest places.
example_zh: 撒哈拉沙漠是最炎熱的地方之一。

example: She designed a beautiful poster for the school event.
example_zh: 她為學校活動設計了一張漂亮的海報。

example: My desk is covered with books and notebooks.
example_zh: 我的書桌上擺滿了書和筆記本。

example: We had ice cream as dessert after dinner.
example_zh: 我們晚餐後吃了冰淇淋當甜點。

example: The smoke alarm can detect fire in the room.
example_zh: 煙霧警報器能偵測到房間裡的火災。

example_zh: 這個小鎮已經發展成一座大城市。

example_zh: 她戴著一枚鑲有小鑽石的戒指。

example: You can use a dictionary to find new words.
example_zh: 你可以用字典來查找新的單字。

example_zh: 那隻老貓昨晚在睡夢中安靜地死去。

example_zh: 健康的飲食包括水果、蔬菜和水。

example: My sister and I have very different hobbies.
example_zh: 我和姊姊有非常不同的興趣愛好。

example: This math problem is too difficult for me.
example_zh: 這道數學題對我來說太困難了。

example: The dog loves to dig holes in the garden.
example_zh: 那隻狗喜歡在花園裡挖洞。

example_zh: 那家飯店的用餐室非常寬敞。

example_zh: 我們昨晚吃了雞肉和米飯當晚餐。

example_zh: 孩子們喜歡閱讀關於大恐龍的書。

example: The teacher will direct the students to their seats.
example_zh: 老師會引導學生到他們的座位。

example: Can you tell me the direction to the station?
example_zh: 你能告訴我去車站的方向嗎？

example: His shoes were very dirty after playing outside.
example_zh: 他在外面玩耍後鞋子變得非常骯髒。

example: She was happy to discover a new coffee shop.
example_zh: 她很高興發現了一家新的咖啡店。

example: Let's discuss our plans for the weekend together.
example_zh: 我們一起來討論週末的計畫吧。

example: My favorite dish is fried rice with vegetables.
example_zh: 我最喜歡的菜餚是蔬菜炒飯。

example: The distance between the two cities is very far.
example_zh: 這兩座城市之間的距離非常遠。

example: Please divide the cake into four equal pieces.
example_zh: 請把蛋糕分成四等份。

example: She likes to do her homework after dinner.
example_zh: 她喜歡在晚飯後做功課。

example: The doctor told me to drink more water.
example_zh: 醫生告訴我要多喝水。

example: My dog likes to run in the park every day.
example_zh: 我的狗每天都喜歡在公園裡跑步。

example: She got a beautiful doll as a birthday gift.
example_zh: 她收到一個漂亮的洋娃娃作為生日禮物。

example: This book costs only five dollars at the store.
example_zh: 這本書在商店裡只要五元。

example: The dolphin jumped out of the water so high.
example_zh: 那隻海豚跳出水面好高。

example: Please close the door when you leave the room.
example_zh: 離開房間時請把門關上。

example: Draw a red dot in the middle of the paper.
example_zh: 在紙的中間畫一個紅點。

example: He ordered a double portion of rice for lunch.
example_zh: 他午餐點了雙倍份量的飯。

example_zh: 那隻貓慢慢地從高樹上跳了下來。

example: My little sister is watching TV downstairs right now.
example_zh: 我的小妹妹現在正在樓下看電視。

example: We often go downtown to shop on Saturdays.
example_zh: 我們常在星期六去市中心購物。

example: My mom bought a dozen eggs at the market.
example_zh: 我媽媽在市場買了一打雞蛋。

example: She likes to draw flowers in her notebook after school.
example_zh: 她放學後喜歡在筆記本上畫花。

example: I keep my socks in the top drawer of my dresser.
example_zh: 我把襪子放在衣櫃最上層的抽屜裡。

example: I had a strange dream about flying over the ocean.
example_zh: 我做了一個在海洋上飛翔的奇怪夢。

example: She wore a blue dress to her friend's birthday party.
example_zh: 她穿了一件藍色洋裝去朋友的生日派對。

example: He drinks a glass of water every morning after waking up.
example_zh: 他每天早上起床後都會喝一杯水。

example: My father drives me to school when it rains.
example_zh: 下雨時，我爸爸會開車送我去學校。

example: The bus driver smiled and said hello to each passenger.
example_zh: 公車司機微笑著向每位乘客打招呼。

example: Be careful not to drop your phone on the floor.
example_zh: 小心不要把手機掉在地板上。

example: I went to the drugstore to buy some cold medicine.
example_zh: 我去藥房買了一些感冒藥。

example: He plays the drum in the school band every Friday.
example_zh: 他每週五在學校樂團裡打鼓。

example: The clothes are dry now, so you can take them in.
example_zh: 衣服現在已經乾了，你可以把它們收起來了。

example: A duck and her babies were swimming in the pond.
example_zh: 一隻鴨子和她的小鴨在池塘裡游泳。

example: My grandmother makes the best dumplings during Chinese New Year.
example_zh: 我奶奶在農曆新年時做的水餃最好吃。

example: Please do not talk during the movie in the theater.
example_zh: 請不要在電影院看電影的時候說話。

example: Each student in the class received a prize for reading.
example_zh: 班上每一位學生都因閱讀而獲得了獎品。

example: The eagle soared high above the tall green mountains.
example_zh: 老鷹在高大的綠色山脈上方高空翱翔。

example: She covered her ears because the music was too loud.
example_zh: 她摀住耳朵，因為音樂實在太吵了。

example: He woke up early to catch the morning bus.
example_zh: 他很早起床，為了趕上早班公車。

example: She works hard every day to earn more money.
example_zh: 她每天努力工作，以便賺取更多的錢。

example: The earth goes around the sun once a year.
example_zh: 地球每年繞著太陽公轉一次。

example: The sun always rises in the east every morning.
example_zh: 太陽每天早晨總是從東方升起。

example: This math problem is easy for most students.
example_zh: 這道數學題對大多數學生來說很容易。

example: We usually eat dinner together as a family.
example_zh: 我們通常全家人一起吃晚餐。

example: Please be careful near the edge of the cliff.
example_zh: 請在懸崖邊緣附近要小心。

example: Parents should educate their children about good manners.
example_zh: 父母應該教育孩子有關良好禮節的知識。

example: A good education can help you find a better job.
example_zh: 良好的教育可以幫助你找到更好的工作。

example: Too much sugar has a bad effect on your health.
example_zh: 攝取過多的糖對你的健康有不良影響。

example: She made a great effort to finish the project on time.
example_zh: 她付出很大的努力，以便按時完成這個專案。

example: My mother cooked two fried eggs for my breakfast.
example_zh: 我媽媽為我的早餐煎了兩個荷包蛋。

example: You can choose either the red bag or the blue one.
example_zh: 你可以選擇紅色袋子或藍色袋子其中一個。

example: My elder sister always helps me with my homework.
example_zh: 我的姊姊總是幫助我做功課。

example: This book teaches elementary math skills to young students.
example_zh: 這本書教年輕學生基礎數學技能。

example: The elephant at the zoo was very big and friendly.
example_zh: 動物園裡的大象又大又友善。

example: We took the elevator to reach the tenth floor quickly.
example_zh: 我們搭電梯快速到達十樓。

example: Is there anything else I can do to help you?
example_zh: 還有其他我可以幫你的事嗎？

example: She sent an e-mail to her teacher about the project.
example_zh: 她傳了一封電子郵件給老師詢問那個專題。

example: The glass was empty, so she poured more water in.
example_zh: 杯子是空的，所以她又倒了一些水進去。

example: The movie will end at nine o'clock tonight.
example_zh: 這部電影今晚九點會結束。

example: In the story, the hero finally defeated his worst enemy.
example_zh: 在故事中，英雄最終打敗了他最可怕的敵人。

example: He did not have enough energy to finish his homework tonight.
example_zh: 他今晚沒有足夠的精力完成功課。

example: The car's engine made a loud noise this morning.
example_zh: 今天早上那輛車的引擎發出很大的聲音。

example: My uncle is an engineer who designs bridges and roads.
example_zh: 我叔叔是一位設計橋梁和道路的工程師。

example: She studies English every day to improve her speaking skills.
example_zh: 她每天學英文以提升她的口說能力。

example: My family enjoys having dinner together every Sunday evening.
example_zh: 我的家人每個週日晚上都喜歡一起吃晚餐。

example: There was not enough time to finish all the questions.
example_zh: 沒有足夠的時間完成所有的題目。

example: Please enter the classroom quietly before the bell rings.
example_zh: 請在鈴聲響起前安靜地進入教室。

example: We should protect the environment by using less plastic.
example_zh: 我們應該少用塑膠來保護環境。

example: I need an eraser to fix my spelling mistake.
example_zh: 我需要一個橡皮擦來修正我的拼字錯誤。

example: The teacher found one error in my homework today.
example_zh: 老師今天在我的作業中發現了一個錯誤。

example: I love fruit, especially strawberries in the summer season.
example_zh: 我喜歡水果，尤其是夏天的草莓。

example: My family traveled to Europe last summer for three weeks.
example_zh: 我的家人去年夏天去歐洲旅行了三個星期。

example: She works so hard that she even studies on weekends.
example_zh: 她非常努力，甚至在週末也在讀書。

example: We usually have dinner together in the evening at home.
example_zh: 我們通常在傍晚時一起在家吃晚餐。

example: The school sports event will be held next Friday morning.
example_zh: 學校的運動活動將在下週五早上舉行。

example: Have you ever tried sushi at a Japanese restaurant before?
example_zh: 你曾經在日本餐廳嚐過壽司嗎？

example: Every student in my class has a different favorite subject.
example_zh: 我班上的每一個學生都有不同的最喜歡的科目。

example: Everybody at the party was dancing and having fun together.
example_zh: 派對上每個人都在跳舞並一起玩得很開心。

example: Everyone should wash their hands before eating a meal.
example_zh: 每個人在吃飯前都應該洗手。

example: She packed everything she needed for the camping trip carefully.
example_zh: 她仔細地把露營旅行所需的每件東西都打包好了。

example: After the concert, fans were everywhere in the city center.
example_zh: 演唱會結束後，歌迷們到處都在市中心。

example: She studied hard for the math exam last night.
example_zh: 她昨晚認真為數學考試做準備。

example_zh: 你能給我一個好習慣的例子嗎？

example_zh: 她在英語考試中得到了優秀的成績。

example: Everyone came to the party except Tom and Lisa.
example_zh: 除了湯姆和麗莎，每個人都來參加派對了。

example: The news about the trip will excite the children.
example_zh: 關於這次旅行的消息會讓孩子們感到興奮。

example: The children were excited to open their birthday presents.
example_zh: 孩子們對打開生日禮物感到非常興奮。

example: The basketball game last night was very exciting to watch.
example_zh: 昨晚的籃球比賽看起來非常令人興奮。

example_zh: 請原諒我今天上課遲到了。

example_zh: 她每天早上運動以保持健康和體態。

example: Please use the exit on the right side of the building.
example_zh: 請使用建築物右側的出口。

example: I expect the bus to arrive in ten minutes.

example: She shook her head and said no to him.
example_zh: 她搖了搖頭，對他說不。

example: I have a bad headache and need some rest.
example_zh: 我頭痛得很厲害，需要休息一下。

example: Eating fresh vegetables every day is good for your health.
example_zh: 每天吃新鮮蔬菜對你的健康有益。

example: Eating fresh fruits and vegetables keeps your body healthy.
example_zh: 吃新鮮的蔬果能讓你的身體保持健康。

example: Can you hear the birds singing outside the window?
example_zh: 你能聽見窗外的鳥兒在唱歌嗎？

example: Her heart beat faster when she saw the surprise.
example_zh: 當她看到驚喜時，她的心跳加速了。

example: The heat from the sun made us feel very tired.
example_zh: 太陽的熱氣讓我們感到非常疲憊。

example: Please turn on the heater because the room is cold.
example_zh: 請打開暖氣機，因為房間很冷。

example: This box is too heavy for me to carry alone.
example_zh: 這個箱子對我來說太重了，一個人搬不動。

example: The helicopter flew over the city to look for help.
example_zh: 那架直升機飛越城市尋找需要幫助的人。

example: She smiled and said hello to her new classmates warmly.
example_zh: 她微笑著，熱情地向新同學說你好。

example: My brother always helps me with my homework after school.
example_zh: 我哥哥放學後總是幫助我做功課。

example: The teacher gave us some very helpful tips for the test.
example_zh: 老師給了我們一些對考試非常有幫助的建議。

example: The hen laid three eggs in the nest this morning.
example_zh: 那隻母雞今天早上在巢裡生了三顆蛋。

example: I gave her a book as a birthday gift yesterday.
example_zh: 我昨天送給她一本書作為生日禮物。

example: Please come here and sit next to me on the bench.
example_zh: 請過來這裡，坐在我旁邊的長椅上。

example: The firefighter became a hero after saving the little girl.
example_zh: 那位消防員在救了小女孩之後成了英雄。

example: This red umbrella is not mine; it is hers.
example_zh: 這把紅色雨傘不是我的，是她的。

example: She made the cake herself for the party.
example_zh: 她自己為派對做了那個蛋糕。

example: Hey, do you want to play basketball after school?
example_zh: 嘿，你放學後想打籃球嗎？

example: Hi, my name is Amy and I am new here.
example_zh: 嗨，我叫Amy，我是新來的。

example: The little cat likes to hide under the bed.
example_zh: 那隻小貓喜歡躲在床底下。

example: The mountain is very high and covered with snow.
example_zh: 那座山非常高，山頂覆蓋著白雪。

example: We drove on the highway to reach the city.
example_zh: 我們沿著公路開車前往那座城市。

example: They plan to hike in the forest this weekend.
example_zh: 他們計畫這個週末在森林裡健行。

example: The children ran up the small hill in the park.
example_zh: 孩子們跑上公園裡那座小山。

example: She gave him a birthday card this morning.
example_zh: 她今天早上送給他一張生日卡片。

example: He fixed the broken chair himself last night.
example_zh: 他昨晚自己修好了那把壞掉的椅子。

example: The shop will hire two new workers next month.
example_zh: 那家店下個月將雇用兩名新員工。

example: His backpack is on the chair near the door.
example_zh: 他的背包放在靠近門的椅子上。

example: We learned about ancient history in class today.
example_zh: 我們今天在課堂上學習了古代歷史。

example: The baseball player hit the ball very far.
example_zh: 那位棒球選手把球打得非常遠。

example: Her favorite hobby is painting colorful pictures at home.
example_zh: 她最喜歡的嗜好是在家畫色彩繽紛的畫。

example: Please hold my hand when we cross the street.
example_zh: 我們過馬路時，請握住我的手。

example: There is a big hole in my sock.
example_zh: 我的襪子上有一個大洞。

example: We are going to the beach for our holiday.
example_zh: 我們假日要去海邊玩。

example: She always feels happy when she gets home.
example_zh: 她回到家時總是感到很開心。

example: He felt very homesick during his first week abroad.
example_zh: 他在國外的第一週感到非常想家。

example: She moved back to her hometown after many years.
example_zh: 她多年後搬回了自己的家鄉。

example: I need to finish my homework before dinner tonight.
example_zh: 我需要在今晚吃晚飯前完成家庭作業。

example: It is important to be honest with your friends.
example_zh: 對你的朋友誠實是很重要的。

example: She likes to put honey in her morning tea.
example_zh: 她喜歡在早茶裡加蜂蜜。

example: The little boy can hop on one foot easily.
example_zh: 這個小男孩可以輕鬆地用單腳跳。

example: I hope the weather will be nice tomorrow.
example_zh: 我希望明天天氣會很好。

example: The farmer has three horses on his farm.
example_zh: 這位農夫的農場裡有三匹馬。

example: The doctor works long hours at the hospital.
example_zh: 這位醫生在醫院工作很長的時間。

example: The host welcomed all the guests with a smile.
example_zh: 主人面帶微笑歡迎所有的客人。

example: It is too hot to play outside today.
example_zh: 今天太熱了，不適合在外面玩。

example: We stayed at a nice hotel near the beach.
example_zh: 我們住在海灘附近一家很好的飯店。

example: The train ride from Taipei to Taichung takes one hour.
example_zh: 從台北到台中的火車車程需要一個小時。

example: My grandmother lives in a small house by the river.
example_zh: 我的祖母住在河邊一棟小房屋裡。

example: She does the housework every morning before going to work.
example_zh: 她每天早上去上班前都會做家事。

example: Can you show me how to make this dish?
example_zh: 你能教我如何做這道菜嗎？

example: The weather was cold; however, we still enjoyed the trip.
example_zh: 天氣很冷，然而我們仍然享受了這次旅行。

example: Every human being needs food, water, and shelter to live.
example_zh: 每個人類都需要食物、水和住所才能生存。

example: Despite his success, he always stayed humble and kind.
example_zh: 儘管他很成功，他始終保持謙虛和善良。

example: Summers in Taiwan are very hot and humid.
example_zh: 台灣的夏天非常炎熱潮濕。

example: His sense of humor always makes everyone laugh out loud.
example_zh: 他的幽默感總是讓每個人開懷大笑。

example: There were more than a hundred people at the party.
example_zh: 派對上有超過一百個人。

example: Hunger is a serious problem in many parts of the world.
example_zh: 飢餓是世界許多地方的嚴重問題。

example: I felt very hungry after playing soccer for two hours.
example_zh: 踢了兩個小時足球後，我感到非常飢餓。

example: Wolves often hunt in groups to catch larger animals.
example_zh: 狼常常成群獵食，以捕捉較大的動物。

example: The hunter walked quietly through the forest looking for deer.
example_zh: 獵人悄悄地走過森林尋找鹿。

example: Please hurry or we will miss the school bus.
example_zh: 請趕快，否則我們會錯過校車。

example: Be careful not to hurt yourself when you run.
example_zh: 跑步時要小心，不要傷到自己。

example: Her husband cooks dinner for the family every night.
example_zh: 她的丈夫每晚為家人做晚餐。

example: I always drink a glass of water in the morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上都會喝一杯水。

example: She put some ice in her drink to cool it.
example_zh: 她在飲料裡加了一些冰塊讓它變涼。

example: That is a great idea for our school project.
example_zh: 那對我們的學校作業來說是個好主意。

example: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
example_zh: 如果明天下雨，我們就待在家裡。

example: It is not nice to ignore your friends at school.
example_zh: 在學校忽略你的朋友是不禮貌的。

example: She felt very ill and could not go to school.
example_zh: 她感到非常不舒服，沒辦法去上學。

example: Can you imagine living on a small island alone?
example_zh: 你能想像一個人住在小島上嗎？

example: It is important to wash your hands before every meal.
example_zh: 每餐飯前洗手是非常重要的。

example: It is impossible to finish all this work in one hour.
example_zh: 在一小時內完成所有這些工作是不可能的。

example: Reading every day can help you improve your English skills.
example_zh: 每天閱讀可以幫助你改善英文技巧。

example: The cat is sleeping in a box near the door.
example_zh: 那隻貓正在門旁的箱子裡睡覺。

example: The baby grew one inch taller in just one month.
example_zh: 這個嬰兒在短短一個月內長高了一英吋。

example: The price includes breakfast and a free drink.
example_zh: 價格包含早餐和一杯免費飲料。

example: Exercise can increase your energy and improve your mood.
example_zh: 運動可以增加你的精力並改善你的心情。

example: She is indeed one of the best students here.
example_zh: 她確實是這裡最優秀的學生之一。

example: India is a large country with many different cultures.
example_zh: 印度是一個擁有許多不同文化的大國。

example: My friend loves to cook Indian food at home.
example_zh: 我的朋友喜歡在家裡烹飪印度料理。

example: Good teachers can influence students in a positive way.
example_zh: 好老師能以積極的方式影響學生。

example: You can find useful information about this topic online.
example_zh: 你可以在網路上找到關於這個主題的有用資訊。

example: The pen ran out of ink during the test.
example_zh: 那支筆在考試中途沒墨水了。

example: The butterfly is a beautiful insect that loves flowers.
example_zh: 蝴蝶是一種喜愛花朵的美麗昆蟲。

example: Please come inside because it is raining heavily outside.
example_zh: 請進來，因為外面正在下大雨。

example: My mom always insists that I eat vegetables every day.
example_zh: 我媽媽總是堅持要我每天吃蔬菜。

example: For instance, you can use a map to find directions.
example_zh: 例如，你可以用地圖來找路。

example: Instant noodles are a quick and easy meal to make.
example_zh: 泡麵是一種快速又簡單的餐點。

example: I didn't want tea, so I had coffee instead.
example_zh: 我不想喝茶，所以改喝咖啡。

example: She plays a musical instrument called the violin very well.
example_zh: 她非常擅長演奏一種叫做小提琴的樂器。

example: She is an intelligent student who always gets good grades.
example_zh: 她是一個聰明的學生，總是得到好成績。

example: Music is her main interest outside of school.
example_zh: 音樂是她在學校以外的主要興趣。

example: He is very interested in learning about space.
example_zh: 他對學習太空知識非常感興趣。

example: The documentary about animals was very interesting to watch.
example_zh: 那部關於動物的紀錄片非常有趣。

example: She wants to work for an international company someday.
example_zh: 她希望有一天能為一家國際公司工作。

example: I use the Internet to find information for school.
example_zh: 我使用網際網路來尋找學校的資料。

example: She had a job interview at the office today.
example_zh: 她今天在辦公室有一個工作面試。

example: The children ran into the park after school.
example_zh: 孩子們放學後跑進了公園。

example: Let me introduce my best friend to you now.
example_zh: 讓我現在把我最好的朋友介紹給你。

example: Thomas Edison helped invent the light bulb long ago.
example_zh: 愛迪生很久以前幫助發明了電燈泡。

example: She will invite all her friends to the party.
example_zh: 她將邀請所有朋友來參加派對。

example: This bridge is made of strong iron and steel.
example_zh: 這座橋是由堅固的鐵和鋼建造的。

example: We took a boat to reach the small island.
example_zh: 我們乘船才能抵達那座小島。

example: The cat is sleeping because it feels very tired.
example_zh: 那隻貓正在睡覺，因為它覺得非常疲倦。

example: Please check each item on the list carefully.
example_zh: 請仔細檢查清單上的每個項目。

example: The dog wagged its tail when it saw me.
example_zh: 那隻狗看到我時搖了搖牠的尾巴。

example: The cat cleaned itself after eating its food.
example_zh: 那隻貓吃完食物後自己梳理毛髮。

example: She put on her jacket before going outside.
example_zh: 她出門前穿上了她的夾克。

example: I like to put strawberry jam on my toast.
example_zh: 我喜歡在吐司上塗草莓果醬。

example: My birthday is in January, the first month.
example_zh: 我的生日在一月，也就是第一個月。

example: Many tourists visit Japan to see cherry blossoms.
example_zh: 許多遊客去日本欣賞櫻花。

example: She is learning Japanese because she loves anime.
example_zh: 她正在學日文，因為她很喜歡動漫。

example: My father likes to listen to jazz music at night.
example_zh: 我父親喜歡在晚上聽爵士樂。

example: He felt jealous when his friend got a new bike.
example_zh: 當他的朋友買了新腳踏車時，他感到嫉妒。

example: She wore her blue jeans to the shopping mall.
example_zh: 她穿著藍色牛仔褲去購物中心。

example: They drove a jeep through the muddy mountain road.
example_zh: 他們開著吉普車穿越泥濘的山路。

example: Finding a good job after college can be hard.
example_zh: 大學畢業後找到一份好工作可能很難。

example: She jogs in the park every morning for exercise.
example_zh: 她每天早上在公園慢跑來運動。

example: He decided to join the school swimming team.
example_zh: 他決定加入學校的游泳隊。

example: He told a funny joke and everyone started laughing.
example_zh: 他說了一個有趣的笑話，大家都笑了起來。

example: The children laughed with joy on their holiday.
example_zh: 孩子們在假期中歡笑，充滿喜悅。

example: She drinks a glass of orange juice every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上喝一杯柳橙汁。

example: We always go to the beach in July.
example_zh: 我們總是在七月去海邊。

example: The kids like to jump in the playground after school.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡放學後在操場上跳躍。

example: The weather is warm and sunny in June.
example_zh: 六月的天氣溫暖又晴朗。

example: Tom is a junior member of the swimming team.
example_zh: 湯姆是游泳隊的初級成員。

example: I just finished my homework ten minutes ago.
example_zh: 我在十分鐘前剛完成了作業。

example: Please keep the door closed when it is cold outside.
example_zh: 天氣寒冷時，請保持門是關著的。

example: I forgot my key, so I cannot open the door.
example_zh: 我忘了帶鑰匙，所以無法開門。

example: He kicked the ball hard and it flew far away.
example_zh: 他用力踢球，球飛得很遠。

example: Every kid in the class got a small gift today.
example_zh: 班上每個小孩今天都得到了一份小禮物。

example: Too much water can kill a plant very quickly.
example_zh: 太多的水會很快讓一株植物死亡。

example: She bought two kilograms of apples at the market.
example_zh: 她在市場買了兩公斤的蘋果。

example: The school is only one kilometer from my house.
example_zh: 學校離我家只有一公里。

example: She is very kind and always helps her classmates.
example_zh: 她非常親切，總是幫助同學。

example: The king wore a golden crown on his head.
example_zh: 國王頭上戴著一頂金色的王冠。

example: The king ruled his kingdom with kindness and care.
example_zh: 國王以善良與關懷統治他的王國。

example: She kissed her mother on the cheek every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早晨親吻媽媽的臉頰。

example: My mother cooks delicious meals in our small kitchen.
example_zh: 我媽媽在我們小小的廚房裡煮美味的餐點。

example: The children flew a colorful kite in the park.
example_zh: 孩子們在公園裡放著一個彩色的風箏。

example: He hurt his knee when he fell off his bike.
example_zh: 他從腳踏車上摔下來時傷了膝蓋。

example: Please use a knife to cut the bread carefully.
example_zh: 請用刀子小心地切麵包。

example: Someone knocked on the door loudly three times.
example_zh: 有人大聲地敲了三次門。

example: I know how to cook simple meals at home.
example_zh: 我知道如何在家裡做簡單的餐點。

example: Reading books every day helps you build more knowledge.
example_zh: 每天閱讀書籍有助於你累積更多知識。

example: The koala sleeps in a tree for many hours.
example_zh: 無尾熊在樹上睡很多個小時。

example: My friend visited Korea last summer and loved it.
example_zh: 我的朋友去年夏天去了韓國，非常喜歡那裡。

example: I enjoy eating Korean food like bibimbap and kimchi.
example_zh: 我喜歡吃韓國食物，例如拌飯和泡菜。

example: She failed the test because of a lack of practice.
example_zh: 她考試不及格，因為缺少練習。

example: A kind lady helped me find the right bus stop.
example_zh: 一位好心的女士幫我找到正確的公車站。

example: We went swimming in the lake last summer.
example_zh: 我們去年夏天在湖裡游泳。

example: The little lamb followed its mother around the farm.
example_zh: 那隻小羊一直跟著媽媽在農場裡走。

example: She turned on the lamp to read her book.
example_zh: 她打開燈來讀書。

example: After the long flight, we were happy to see land.
example_zh: 長途飛行後，我們很高興看到陸地。

example: Learning a new language can open many doors for you.
example_zh: 學習一門新語言可以為你打開許多扇門。

example: They live in a large house with a big garden.
example_zh: 他們住在一棟有大花園的大房子裡。

example: She was the last student to finish the test.
example_zh: 她是最後一個完成考試的學生。

example: He was late for school because he missed the bus.
example_zh: 他因為錯過公車而上學遲到了。

example: I will call you later when I get home.
example_zh: 我回到家後再打電話給你。

example: Have you seen the latest movie in the series?
example_zh: 你看過這個系列的最新電影了嗎？

example: The funny story made everyone in the room laugh.
example_zh: 這個有趣的故事讓房間裡的每個人都笑了。

example: Everyone must follow the law to keep our society safe.
example_zh: 每個人都必須遵守法律，以維護社會安全。

example: She studied hard for many years to become a lawyer.
example_zh: 她努力讀書多年，才成為一名律師。

example: Please lay your books on the desk before class starts.
example_zh: 請在上課前把你的書放在桌上。

example: The lazy cat slept on the sofa all afternoon.
example_zh: 那隻懶惰的貓整個下午都睡在沙發上。

example: She will lead the team to success this year.
example_zh: 她今年將帶領團隊走向成功。

example: A good leader always listens to their team members.
example_zh: 一位好的領袖總是傾聽團隊成員的意見。

example: The green leaf fell slowly from the tall tree.
example_zh: 那片綠葉從高大的樹上緩緩飄落。

example: She wants to learn English so she can travel.
example_zh: 她想學英文，這樣她就能去旅行。

example: This is the least expensive bag in the store.
example_zh: 這是店裡最便宜的包包。

example: He will leave the office at five o'clock today.
example_zh: 他今天將在五點鐘離開辦公室。

example: Turn left at the corner to find the school.
example_zh: 在轉角處左轉就能找到學校。

example: She hurt her leg while playing soccer last weekend.
example_zh: 她上週末踢足球時傷了腿。

example: She added a slice of lemon to her tea.
example_zh: 她在茶裡加了一片檸檬。

example: Can you lend me your pen for a moment?
example_zh: 你能借我一支筆用一下嗎？

example: He drinks less coffee now to sleep better at night.
example_zh: 他現在喝較少的咖啡，以便晚上能睡得更好。

example: Our English lesson starts at nine o'clock every morning.
example_zh: 我們的英語課每天早上九點開始。

example: Please let me know if you need any help.
example_zh: 如果你需要任何幫助，請告訴我。

example: She wrote a letter to her friend in Japan.
example_zh: 她寫了一封信給她在日本的朋友。

example: I always add fresh lettuce to my sandwiches at home.
example_zh: 我總是在家裡做的三明治裡加入新鮮的萵苣。

example: Her English level is high enough to read novels.
example_zh: 她的英語程度高到足以閱讀小說。

example: You can borrow books for free at the library.
example_zh: 你可以在圖書館免費借書。

example: She was tired and decided to lie on the sofa.
example_zh: 她很累，決定躺在沙發上。

example: He moved to a new city to start a new life.
