example: My grandfather is old but still very active.
example_zh: 我的祖父年紀大了，但仍然非常活躍。

example: You can omit the last step if you are busy.
example_zh: 如果你很忙，可以省略最後一個步驟。

example: There is a book on the table near the window.
example_zh: 窗戶旁邊的桌子上有一本書。

example: I visited Japan once and I loved it.
example_zh: 我去過日本一次，我非常喜歡那裡。

example: She has one sister and two brothers at home.
example_zh: 她有一個姊妹和兩個兄弟。

example: It is important to take care of oneself every day.
example_zh: 每天照顧好自己是非常重要的。

example: She cut the onion and her eyes started to water.
example_zh: 她切洋蔥時，眼睛開始流淚。

example: She only eats vegetables and never touches meat.
example_zh: 她只吃蔬菜，從不碰肉。

example: Please open the window because the room is hot.
example_zh: 請打開窗戶，因為房間很熱。

example: Can you teach me how to operate this machine?
example_zh: 你能教我如何操作這台機器嗎？

example: In my opinion, this movie is really very boring.
example_zh: 在我看來，這部電影真的很無聊。

example: Would you like coffee or tea this morning?
example_zh: 你今天早上想喝咖啡還是茶？

example: She drinks a glass of orange juice every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上喝一杯柳橙汁。

example: We can order pizza online and pick it up.
example_zh: 我們可以在網路上訂披薩並自取。

example: The other students finished the test before me today.
example_zh: 其他學生今天在我之前完成了測驗。

example: Our teacher gave us a lot of homework today.
example_zh: 我們的老師今天給了我們很多作業。

example: That red car over there is ours, not theirs.
example_zh: 那邊那輛紅色的車是我們的，不是他們的。

example: We cooked the whole dinner by ourselves last night.
example_zh: 我們昨晚自己煮了整頓晚餐。

example: The children ran out of the classroom after school.
example_zh: 孩子們放學後跑出了教室。

example: It is raining outside, so let us stay home.
example_zh: 外面在下雨，所以我們待在家裡吧。

example: She put the cake in the oven for thirty minutes.
example_zh: 她把蛋糕放進烤箱烤了三十分鐘。

example: A large bird is flying over the tall building.
example_zh: 一隻大鳥正飛過那棟高樓上方。

example: We crossed the busy road using the overpass nearby.
example_zh: 我們走過附近的天橋穿越那條繁忙的道路。

example: My sister has been living overseas for three years.
example_zh: 我姊姊已在海外生活三年了。

example: She finally owns a small apartment in the city.
example_zh: 她終於在城市裡擁有一間小公寓。

example: The owner of the café makes really great coffee.
example_zh: 這家咖啡廳的老闆煮的咖啡非常棒。

example: The farmer used an ox to plow his field.
example_zh: 農夫用一頭牛來耕他的田地。

example: Please pack your bag before we leave tomorrow morning.
example_zh: 請在我們明天早上出發前把包包打包好。

example: A large package arrived at my door this morning.
example_zh: 今天早上有一個大包裹送到我家門口。

example: Please read the story on page ten of your book.
example_zh: 請閱讀你書本第十頁的故事。

example: He felt great pain after falling off his bicycle.
example_zh: 從腳踏車上摔下來後，他感到劇烈的疼痛。

example: Getting a tooth pulled at the dentist is very painful.
example_zh: 在牙醫那裡拔牙是非常痛苦的。

example: The children love to paint colorful pictures at school.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在學校畫色彩繽紛的圖畫。

example: The famous painter sold his artwork at a high price.
example_zh: 這位著名的畫家以高價出售了他的藝術作品。

example: She bought a new pair of shoes yesterday afternoon.
example_zh: 她昨天下午買了一雙新鞋子。

example: The little boy wore his blue pajamas to bed.
example_zh: 這個小男孩穿著他的藍色睡衣上床睡覺。

example: She looked very pale after hearing the bad news.
example_zh: 聽到壞消息後，她看起來非常蒼白。

example: She uses a pan to cook eggs every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上用平底鍋煎蛋。

example: The panda at the zoo loves to eat bamboo.
example_zh: 動物園裡的熊貓喜歡吃竹子。

example: He bought a new pair of blue pants yesterday.
example_zh: 他昨天買了一條新的藍色褲子。

example: My mother cuts fresh papaya for breakfast every day.
example_zh: 我媽媽每天早餐都切新鮮的木瓜。

example: Please write your name on a piece of paper.
example_zh: 請在一張紙上寫下你的名字。

example: She asked him to pardon her for being late.
example_zh: 她請求他原諒她遲到了。

example: Every parent wants their child to be happy and healthy.
example_zh: 每位父母都希望自己的孩子快樂又健康。

example: We like to walk our dog in the park.
example_zh: 我們喜歡在公園裡遛狗。

example: Her parrot can say hello and goodbye in English.
example_zh: 她的鸚鵡會用英文說哈囉和再見。

example: The hardest part of learning English is the grammar.
example_zh: 學英文最難的部分是文法。

example: Please work with your partner to finish this exercise.
example_zh: 請和你的夥伴一起完成這個練習。

example: We are having a birthday party for my sister.
example_zh: 我們正在為我妹妹舉辦生日派對。

example: She studied hard and passed her English test easily.
example_zh: 她努力讀書，輕鬆通過了英文考試。

example: Every passenger must wear a seatbelt on the bus.
example_zh: 每位乘客在公車上都必須繫安全帶。

example: In the past, people did not have mobile phones.
example_zh: 在過去，人們沒有手機。

example: There is a narrow path through the green forest.
example_zh: 森林裡有一條穿越其中的狹窄小徑。

example: Please be patient; the doctor will see you soon.
example_zh: 請耐心等候，醫生很快就會來看你。

example: I need to pay for my lunch at the cafeteria.
example_zh: 我需要在餐廳付午餐的費用。

example: We play sports and exercise during our PE class.
example_zh: 我們在體育課上運動和做體能訓練。

example: Everyone hopes to live in peace and happiness.
example_zh: 每個人都希望生活在和平與幸福之中。

example: The countryside is quiet and peaceful on Sunday mornings.
example_zh: 鄉村在週日早晨非常寧靜祥和。

example: She bought a sweet pear from the fruit shop today.
example_zh: 她今天從水果店買了一顆甜梨子。

example: Can I borrow your pen to sign this form?
example_zh: 我可以借你的筆來簽這份表格嗎？

example: He used a pencil to draw a picture of his cat.
example_zh: 他用鉛筆畫了一幅他的貓的圖畫。

example: Many people go to the park on sunny weekends.
example_zh: 許多人在晴朗的週末去公園散步。

example: She added some pepper to make the soup taste better.
example_zh: 她加了一些胡椒，讓湯的味道更好。

example: This hotel room costs five hundred dollars per night.
example_zh: 這間飯店的房間每晚要五百元。

example: This sunny weather is perfect for a picnic in the park.
example_zh: 這樣的晴朗天氣非常適合在公園野餐。

example: Perhaps we can go to the beach next Saturday.
example_zh: 或許我們下週六可以一起去海邊。

example: The school has a short rest period after lunch.
example_zh: 學校在午餐後有一段短暫的休息時間。

example: She is the kindest person I have ever met.
example_zh: 她是我見過最善良的人。

example: Please keep my personal information private and safe.
example_zh: 請保管好我的個人資料，不要外洩。

example: My pet cat sleeps on the sofa every afternoon.
example_zh: 我的寵物貓每天下午都睡在沙發上。

example: She took a photo of the sunset at the beach.
example_zh: 她在海邊拍了一張日落的照片。

example: He found an old photograph of his family in a box.
example_zh: 他在一個箱子裡找到一張家人的老照片。

example: She practices piano for one hour every day after school.
example_zh: 她每天放學後練習一小時鋼琴。

example: You can pick any book you like from the shelf.
example_zh: 你可以從書架上挑選任何你喜歡的書。

example: We had a picnic in the park on a sunny day.
example_zh: 我們在一個晴天去公園野餐。

example: There is a beautiful picture of mountains on the wall.
example_zh: 牆上有一幅美麗的山景圖片。

example: My grandmother baked a delicious apple pie for us.
example_zh: 我奶奶為我們烤了一個美味的蘋果派。

example: Can I have another piece of chocolate cake, please?
example_zh: 請問我可以再吃一塊巧克力蛋糕嗎？

example: The farmer feeds the pigs twice every single day.
example_zh: 那位農夫每天餵豬兩次。

example: A pigeon was sitting quietly on the window ledge.
example_zh: 一隻鴿子靜靜地坐在窗台上。

example: There is a big pile of dirty clothes on the floor.
example_zh: 地板上有一大堆髒衣服。

example: The doctor told me to take one pill after meals.
example_zh: 醫生告訴我飯後要吃一顆藥丸。

example: She put a soft pillow under her head to sleep.
example_zh: 她把一個柔軟的枕頭放在頭下睡覺。

example: The pilot landed the plane safely in heavy rain.
example_zh: 飛行員在大雨中安全地降落了飛機。

example: She used a pin to hold the paper on the board.
example_zh: 她用一根大頭針把紙固定在板子上。

example: I like to eat fresh pineapple on hot summer days.
example_zh: 我喜歡在炎熱的夏天吃新鮮的鳳梨。

example: She wore a pink dress to her friend's birthday party.
example_zh: 她穿著一件粉紅色的洋裝去參加朋友的生日派對。

example: The worker fixed the broken pipe under the kitchen sink.
example_zh: 工人修好了廚房水槽下面破裂的管子。

example: We ordered a large pizza with cheese and vegetables tonight.
example_zh: 我們今晚點了一份加起司和蔬菜的大比薩。

example: The park is a great place to relax on weekends.
example_zh: 公園是週末放鬆的好地方。

example: He prefers plain white shirts without any patterns or colors.
example_zh: 他喜歡沒有任何圖案或顏色的樸素白色襯衫。

example: We need to make a plan before our school trip.
example_zh: 我們在學校旅行之前需要制定一個計畫。

example: Earth is the only planet we know that has life.
example_zh: 地球是我們所知道的唯一有生命的行星。

example: My mother likes to plant flowers in her small garden.
example_zh: 我媽媽喜歡在她的小花園裡種花。

example: Please put the sandwiches on a clean plate for everyone.
example_zh: 請把三明治放在一個乾淨的盤子上給大家。

example: We waited on the platform for the next train to arrive.
example_zh: 我們在月台上等待下一班火車到來。

example: The children play in the park after school every day.
example_zh: 孩子們每天放學後在公園玩耍。

example: He is the best player on our basketball team.
example_zh: 他是我們籃球隊裡最優秀的選手。

example: The children are playing happily at the playground.
example_zh: 孩子們在遊樂場裡快樂地玩耍。

example: We had a pleasant walk in the park today.
example_zh: 我們今天在公園裡散了一次愉快的步。

example: Please pass me the salt on the table.
example_zh: 請把桌上的鹽遞給我。

example: It is a pleasure to meet you here today.
example_zh: 今天能在這裡見到你真是愉快。

example: Three plus five equals eight, as everyone knows.
example_zh: 三加五等於八，這是大家都知道的。

example: He put his phone into his jacket pocket.
example_zh: 他把手機放進夾克的口袋裡。

example: She wrote a short poem about the autumn leaves.
example_zh: 她寫了一首關於秋葉的短詩。

example: Can you point to the place on the map?
example_zh: 你能在地圖上指出那個地方嗎？

example: The police arrived quickly after we called for help.
example_zh: 警察在我們求救之後很快就趕到了。

example: It is important to be polite to older people.
example_zh: 對年長的人保持禮貌是很重要的。

example: Factories should not pollute the river with dirty water.
example_zh: 工廠不應該用髒水污染河流。

example: There are many colorful fish in the small pond.
example_zh: 小池塘裡有許多色彩繽紛的魚。

example: The hotel has a large outdoor swimming pool.
example_zh: 這家飯店有一個大型的戶外游泳池。

example: The poor family could not afford new winter clothes.
example_zh: 這個貧窮的家庭買不起新的冬衣。

example: We always eat popcorn when we watch a movie.
example_zh: 我們看電影時總是吃爆米花。

example: This song is very popular among young people today.
example_zh: 這首歌在現今的年輕人之間非常受歡迎。

example: My mother cooked pork with vegetables for dinner tonight.
example_zh: 我媽媽今晚煮了豬肉配蔬菜當晚餐。

example: Please move to your correct position before the game starts.
example_zh: 比賽開始前，請移動到你正確的位置。

example: It is possible to learn a new language every day.
example_zh: 每天學習一門新語言是可能的。

example: She posted a funny photo on her social media page.
example_zh: 她在社群媒體頁面上張貼了一張有趣的照片。

example: He sent me a postcard from his trip to Paris.
example_zh: 他從巴黎旅行時寄給我一張明信片。

example: She put the vegetables into the pot with some water.
example_zh: 她把蔬菜和一些水放進鍋子裡。

example: I like to eat potato soup on cold winter days.
example_zh: 我喜歡在寒冷的冬天喝馬鈴薯湯。

example: The baby weighed about seven pounds when she was born.
example_zh: 這個嬰兒出生時大約重七磅。

example: The storm cut the power to our whole neighborhood last night.
example_zh: 昨晚的暴風雨切斷了我們整個社區的電力。

example: The powerful wind knocked down many trees in the park.
example_zh: 強勁的風吹倒了公園裡許多棵樹。

example: You need to practice speaking English every day to improve.
example_zh: 你需要每天練習說英語才能進步。

example: The teacher praised the student for her excellent test score.
example_zh: 老師稱讚這位學生的考試成績非常優異。

example: Every night, she prays for her family's health and safety.
example_zh: 每天晚上，她都為家人的健康與安全祈禱。

example: She needs to prepare dinner before her family comes home.
example_zh: 她需要在家人回家前準備晚餐。

example: He gave her a beautiful present on her birthday.
example_zh: 他在她生日那天送給她一份美麗的禮物。

example: The president gave an important speech to the whole nation.
example_zh: 總統向全國人民發表了一篇重要演講。

example: She wore a pretty dress to the school party.
example_zh: 她穿著一件漂亮的洋裝去學校派對。

example: The price of this jacket is too high for me.
example_zh: 這件夾克的價格對我來說太高了。

example: The priest spoke kindly to everyone at the church service.
example_zh: 牧師在教會禮拜中親切地對每個人說話。

example: The young prince learned how to ride a horse well.
example_zh: 年輕的王子學會了如何騎馬。

example: The princess lived in a big beautiful castle with her family.
example_zh: 公主和她的家人住在一座又大又美麗的城堡裡。

example: Please print the document before the meeting starts this morning.
example_zh: 請在今天早上的會議開始前把文件列印出來。

example: The printer in our office ran out of paper again.
example_zh: 我們辦公室的印表機又沒紙了。

example: This is a private room, so please knock before entering.
example_zh: 這是一間私人房間，請進入前先敲門。

example: She won first prize in the school science competition.
example_zh: 她在學校科學比賽中贏得了第一名獎品。

example: It will probably rain tomorrow, so bring an umbrella with you.
example_zh: 明天可能會下雨，所以記得帶傘。

example: We need to find a way to solve this problem.
example_zh: 我們需要找到一個方法來解決這個問題。

example: This factory can produce five hundred cars every single day.
example_zh: 這間工廠每天能生產五百輛汽車。

example: This new product is very popular in the market.
example_zh: 這個新產品在市場上非常受歡迎。

example: The professor gave us a lot of homework today.
example_zh: 教授今天給了我們很多作業。

example: My favorite TV program starts at eight o'clock tonight.
example_zh: 我最喜歡的電視節目今晚八點開始。

example: She has made great progress in her English class.
example_zh: 她在英語課上取得了很大的進步。

example: I promise to finish my homework before dinner tonight.
example_zh: 我承諾今晚吃飯前完成我的作業。

example: Can you teach me how to pronounce this word?
example_zh: 你能教我怎麼發這個單字的音嗎？

example: We should protect the environment for future generations.
example_zh: 我們應該為後代保護環境。

example: Her parents are very proud of her good grades.
example_zh: 她的父母對她優異的成績感到非常驕傲。

example: There is a public library near my house.
example_zh: 我家附近有一座公共圖書館。

example: Please pull the door open instead of pushing it.
example_zh: 請拉開門，不要用推的。

example: We bought a big orange pumpkin for Halloween.
example_zh: 我們買了一個大橘色南瓜來慶祝萬聖節。

example: The teacher will punish students who cheat on tests.
example_zh: 老師會處罰考試作弊的學生。

example: The little puppy followed me home after school today.
example_zh: 那隻小狗今天放學後跟著我回家。

example: She wore a beautiful purple dress to the party.
example_zh: 她穿著一件漂亮的紫色洋裝去參加派對。

example: The purpose of this meeting is to share ideas.
example_zh: 這次會議的目的是分享想法。

example: She found her purse on the kitchen table this morning.
example_zh: 她今天早上在廚房桌上找到了她的錢包。

example: Please push the door open before you walk inside.
example_zh: 請在走進去之前把門推開。

example: He put his books on the desk after class.
example_zh: 他下課後把書放在桌上。

example: The children worked together to finish the puzzle quickly.
example_zh: 孩子們合力很快地完成了拼圖。

example: She ate only a quarter of the big pizza.
example_zh: 她只吃了那個大披薩的四分之一。

example: The queen wore a beautiful crown at the ceremony.
example_zh: 皇后在典禮上戴著一頂美麗的王冠。

example: The teacher asked a question that no one could answer.
example_zh: 老師問了一個沒有人能回答的問題。

example: He took a quick shower before going to school.
example_zh: 他去學校前快速地沖了個澡。

example: Please be quiet because the baby is sleeping now.
example_zh: 請保持安靜，因為嬰兒現在正在睡覺。

example: She decided to quit her job and start a business.
example_zh: 她決定辭掉工作，開始創業。

example: The weather today is quite cold for this time of year.
example_zh: 今天的天氣對這個時節來說相當寒冷。

example: We have a short quiz on Friday about new words.
example_zh: 我們週五有一個關於新單字的小考。

example: The little rabbit ate some carrots in the garden.
example_zh: 那隻小兔子在花園裡吃了一些胡蘿蔔。

example: He won first place in the school running race.
example_zh: 他在學校的跑步比賽中獲得了第一名。

example: My grandfather likes to listen to the radio every morning.
example_zh: 我祖父喜歡每天早上聽收音機。

example: The railroad connects the two cities across the mountains.
example_zh: 這條鐵路穿越山脈連接了兩座城市。

example: The railway station is very busy on Friday evenings.
example_zh: 鐵路車站在週五晚上非常繁忙。

example: It will rain heavily this afternoon, so bring an umbrella.
example_zh: 今天下午會下大雨，所以記得帶傘。

example: We saw a beautiful rainbow after the heavy rain stopped.
example_zh: 大雨停後，我們看見了一道美麗的彩虹。

example: On rainy days, I like to stay home and read.
example_zh: 在下雨天，我喜歡待在家裡閱讀。

example: She raised her hand to answer the teacher's question.
example_zh: 她舉起手來回答老師的問題。

example: The rapid changes in technology surprise many older people.
example_zh: 科技的快速變化讓許多年長者感到驚訝。

example: Snow is rare in this warm and sunny city.
example_zh: 在這座溫暖晴朗的城市裡，雪是很罕見的。

example: The cat chased the rat around the kitchen floor.
example_zh: 貓在廚房地板上追著老鼠跑。

example: I would rather walk to school than take the bus.
example_zh: 我寧願走路去學校，也不願搭公車。

example: Can you reach the top shelf without a chair?
example_zh: 你不用椅子能搆到最上面那層架子嗎？

example: She reads a new book every two or three weeks.
example_zh: 她每兩三週就讀一本新書。

example: Are you ready to leave for school right now?
example_zh: 你現在準備好出發去學校了嗎？

example: The movie is based on a real story from history.
example_zh: 這部電影是根據歷史上的真實故事改編的。

example: I did not realize how late it was until now.
example_zh: 我直到現在才意識到已經這麼晚了。

example: I really enjoyed the movie we watched last night.
example_zh: 我真的很喜歡我們昨晚看的那部電影。

example: The reason she was late was the heavy traffic.
example_zh: 她遲到的原因是交通很擁擠。

example: She was happy to receive a gift from her friend.
example_zh: 她很高興從朋友那裡收到一份禮物。

example: The teacher asked us to record our test scores.
example_zh: 老師要求我們記錄自己的考試成績。

example: The blackboard is in the shape of a rectangle.
example_zh: 黑板的形狀是一個長方形。

example: We should recycle paper and plastic bottles every day.
example_zh: 我們應該每天回收紙張和塑膠瓶。

example: She wore a red dress to the birthday party.
example_zh: 她穿著一件紅色洋裝去參加生日派對。

example: Please put the leftover food in the refrigerator now.
example_zh: 請現在把剩菜放進冰箱裡。

example: She refused to go outside in the cold weather.
example_zh: 她拒絕在寒冷的天氣裡出門。

example: I regret not studying harder for the English test.
example_zh: 我後悔沒有為英文考試更努力地學習。

example: He has a regular schedule for studying every evening.
example_zh: 他每天晚上都有規律的學習時間表。

example: Do you remember the name of our first teacher?
example_zh: 你記得我們第一位老師的名字嗎？

example: My father can repair broken things around the house.
example_zh: 我父親能修理家裡損壞的東西。

example: Could you please repeat the question more slowly for me?
example_zh: 你能為我更慢地重複那個問題嗎？

example: She did not reply to my message until the next day.
example_zh: 她直到第二天才回覆我的訊息。

example: She will report the news on TV tonight.
example_zh: 她今晚將在電視上報導這則新聞。

example: The reporter asked the mayor several important questions.
example_zh: 那位記者向市長提了幾個重要的問題。

example: You should rest for an hour after lunch.
example_zh: 你午餐後應該休息一個小時。

example: We had dinner at a nice Italian restaurant.
example_zh: 我們在一家不錯的義大利餐廳吃晚餐。

example: Could you tell me where the restroom is?
example_zh: 你能告訴我洗手間在哪裡嗎？

example: The result of the test surprised everyone in class.
example_zh: 這次考試的結果讓全班都很驚訝。

example: She will return home from her trip next week.
example_zh: 她下週將從旅行中回家。

example: Let's review the key words before the big test.
example_zh: 我們在大考前複習一下重點單字吧。

example: My mom cooks rice for dinner every single day.
example_zh: 我媽媽每天都煮米飯當晚餐。

example: The rich man donated money to help poor children.
example_zh: 那位富有的男人捐錢幫助貧窮的孩子。

example: I ride my bike to school every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上騎腳踏車上學。

example: Turn right at the corner to find the park.
example_zh: 在轉角右轉就能找到那座公園。

example: She wore a beautiful gold ring on her finger.
example_zh: 她的手指上戴著一枚漂亮的金戒指。

example: The sun rises early during the summer months.
example_zh: 夏天的月份太陽升起得很早。

example: We had a picnic near the wide river.
example_zh: 我們在寬闊的河邊野餐。

example: The road to the village is very long and narrow.
example_zh: 通往村莊的道路又長又窄。

example: A thief tried to rob the old man last night.
example_zh: 昨晚一個小偷試圖搶劫那位老人。

example: The robot in the factory can build cars very fast.
example_zh: 工廠裡的機器人可以非常快速地製造汽車。

example: She found a smooth rock near the river bank.
example_zh: 她在河岸附近找到一塊光滑的岩石。

example: He played the role of a doctor in the play.
example_zh: 他在戲劇中扮演了一名醫生的角色。

example: The ball began to roll down the hill quickly.
example_zh: 球開始快速地滾下山坡。

example: There is a small bird sitting on our roof.
example_zh: 有一隻小鳥坐在我們的屋頂上。

example: My room has a big window and a white desk.
example_zh: 我的房間有一扇大窗戶和一張白色書桌。

example: The root of this tree goes very deep underground.
example_zh: 這棵樹的根深入地下很深。

example: The children used a rope to climb over the wall.
example_zh: 孩子們用一條繩子爬過牆壁。

example: She gave her mother a beautiful red rose yesterday.
example_zh: 她昨天給了她媽媽一朵美麗的紅玫瑰。

example: The moon looks perfectly round on a clear night.
example_zh: 在晴朗的夜晚，月亮看起來非常圓。

example: Please sit in the first row near the stage.
example_zh: 請坐在靠近舞台的第一排。

example: She rubbed her hands together to keep them warm.
example_zh: 她摩擦雙手以保持溫暖。

example: Rubber boots are very useful when it rains heavily.
example_zh: 下大雨時，橡膠靴非常有用。

example: It is rude to talk loudly on your phone in class.
example_zh: 在課堂上大聲講電話是很無禮的。

example: She used a ruler to draw a straight line on the paper.
example_zh: 她用尺在紙上畫了一條直線。

example: I run in the park every morning to stay healthy.
example_zh: 我每天早上在公園跑步以保持健康。

example: He felt sad when his best friend moved to another city.
example_zh: 當他最好的朋友搬到另一個城市時，他感到很悲傷。

example: This neighborhood is safe for children to play outside.
example_zh: 這個社區對孩子們在外面玩耍是安全的。

example: We will sail across the lake on a sunny afternoon.
example_zh: 我們將在一個晴朗的下午乘船橫越湖面。

example: The old sailor told us exciting stories about the sea.
example_zh: 那位老水手告訴我們一些關於大海的精彩故事。

example: She made a fresh salad with tomatoes, lettuce, and carrots.
example_zh: 她用番茄、萵苣和胡蘿蔔做了一份新鮮沙拉。

example: The shoes are on sale, so they cost less than usual.
example_zh: 這雙鞋正在特價出售，所以比平時便宜。

example: The friendly salesman showed us the newest models in the store.
example_zh: 那位友善的推銷員向我們展示了店裡最新的款式。

example: Please don't add too much salt to the soup today.
example_zh: 今天請不要在湯裡加太多鹽。

example: We were surprised to find the same book in both bags.
example_zh: 我們很驚訝地發現兩個袋子裡有相同的書。

example: The baker gave us a small sample of the new cake.
example_zh: 麵包師傅給了我們一小份新蛋糕的樣品。

example: The children love to build castles in the warm beach sand.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在溫暖的海灘沙地上堆城堡。

example: I made a cheese and tomato sandwich for my lunch today.
example_zh: 我今天午餐做了一個起司和番茄三明治。

example: A good meal can satisfy you after a long day.
example_zh: 一頓好餐可以在漫長的一天後讓你感到滿足。

example: We usually go shopping together on Saturday morning.
example_zh: 我們通常在星期六早上一起去購物。

example: He worked extra hours to save money for a trip.
example_zh: 他加班工作以存錢去旅行。

example: She always says hello to her neighbors every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上都向鄰居打招呼。

example: The little girl was scared of the big dog.
example_zh: 那個小女孩很害怕那隻大狗。

example: She wore a warm scarf around her neck in winter.
example_zh: 她在冬天在脖子上圍著一條溫暖的圍巾。

example: The last scene of the movie made everyone cry.
example_zh: 電影的最後一幕讓所有人都哭了。

example: My school has a big library and a playground.
example_zh: 我的學校有一個大圖書館和一個操場。

example: Science helps us understand how the world works.
example_zh: 科學幫助我們了解世界是如何運作的。

example: The scientist spent years studying how plants grow.
example_zh: 那位科學家花了多年研究植物如何生長。

example: He rides his scooter to work every day.
example_zh: 他每天騎摩托車去上班。

example: She got a perfect score on her English test.
example_zh: 她在英語考試中得了滿分。

example: We watched the beautiful sunset over the calm sea.
example_zh: 我們看著平靜的海面上美麗的夕陽。

example: I searched online for information about the new restaurant.
example_zh: 我在網上搜尋了關於那家新餐廳的資訊。

example: Summer is my favorite season because I love the beach.
example_zh: 夏天是我最喜歡的季節，因為我喜歡海灘。

example: Please take a seat near the window in the classroom.
example_zh: 請在教室裡靠窗的座位坐下。

example: She finished the race in second place last weekend.
example_zh: 她上週末在比賽中獲得了第二名。

example: Don't tell anyone because this is our little secret.
example_zh: 不要告訴任何人，因為這是我們的小秘密。

example: The secretary answered the phone and wrote a message.
example_zh: 秘書接了電話並寫下一則留言。

example: I can see a beautiful rainbow after the rain.
example_zh: 雨後我可以看見一道美麗的彩虹。

example: She planted a small seed in the garden today.
example_zh: 她今天在花園裡種下了一粒小種子。

example: You seem tired today, so did you sleep well?
example_zh: 你今天似乎很累，你昨晚睡得好嗎？

example: The children laughed and played on the seesaw together.
example_zh: 孩子們一起在翹翹板上笑著玩耍。

example: My grandfather seldom eats fast food because it is unhealthy.
example_zh: 我爺爺很少吃速食，因為那對健康不好。

example: The farmer sells fresh vegetables at the market every morning.
example_zh: 這位農夫每天早上在市場裡賣新鮮蔬菜。

example: We have many exciting projects this semester at school.
example_zh: 這個學期我們在學校有許多令人興奮的專題。

example: I will send you a postcard from my vacation.
example_zh: 我會在假期中寄一張明信片給你。

example: The senior students helped the new kids find their classrooms.
example_zh: 高年級的學生幫助新生找到了他們的教室。

example: Can you write a sentence using the word happy?
example_zh: 你能用「happy」這個單字造一個句子嗎？

example: School usually starts again in September after the summer break.
example_zh: 暑假結束後，學校通常在九月重新開學。

example: My teacher has a serious look when we take tests.
example_zh: 我的老師在我們考試時表情嚴肅。

example: The old servant cleaned the rooms every morning carefully.
example_zh: 那位老僕人每天早上仔細地打掃房間。

example: The waiter will serve our food in a few minutes.
example_zh: 服務生將在幾分鐘內為我們上菜。

example: The service at this restaurant is always fast and friendly.
example_zh: 這家餐廳的服務總是既快速又友善。

example: She set the cups on the table before breakfast.
example_zh: 她在早餐前把杯子放在桌上。

example: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上七點起床。

example: She bought several apples and oranges at the market.
example_zh: 她在市場買了幾個蘋果和橘子。

example: The little boy shook the bottle to mix the juice.
example_zh: 小男孩搖晃瓶子來混合果汁。

example: Shall we go for a walk after dinner tonight?
example_zh: 我們今晚吃完晚飯後要去散步嗎？

example: The cookie cutter made cookies in the shape of stars.
example_zh: 餅乾模型做出了星形的餅乾。

example: Tom and his sister always share their snacks after school.
example_zh: 湯姆和他的妹妹放學後總是分享零食。

example: The shark swam quickly through the deep blue ocean water.
example_zh: 鯊魚在深藍色的海水中快速游動。

example: Be careful with that knife because it is very sharp.
example_zh: 小心那把刀，因為它非常鋒利。

example: She loves reading books in the park on weekends.
example_zh: 她喜歡在週末去公園看書。

example: The farmer has twenty sheep on his green farm.
example_zh: 那位農夫在他的綠色農場上養了二十隻綿羊。

example: She put a clean white sheet on the bed.
example_zh: 她在床上鋪了一條乾淨的白色床單。

example: The books are on the top shelf in my room.
example_zh: 那些書放在我房間最上層的架子上。

example: The sun shines brightly on a clear summer day.
example_zh: 晴朗的夏日，太陽明亮地照耀著。

example: The big ship sailed slowly across the ocean.
example_zh: 那艘大船緩慢地駛過海洋。

example: He wore a blue shirt to his job interview.
example_zh: 他穿著一件藍色襯衫去參加面試。

example: She lost one shoe while running in the park.
example_zh: 她在公園跑步時掉了一隻鞋子。

example: The player can shoot the ball into the basket.
example_zh: 這名球員可以把球投進籃框裡。

example: She likes to shop for clothes on weekends.
example_zh: 她喜歡在週末去購物買衣服。

example: The kind shopkeeper helped me find what I needed.
example_zh: 親切的店主幫我找到了我需要的東西。

example: We walked along the shore and collected pretty shells.
example_zh: 我們沿著岸邊散步，撿了漂亮的貝殼。

example: The short boy could not reach the top shelf.
example_zh: 那個矮個子的男孩搆不到最上層的架子。

example: He wore shorts and a T-shirt to the beach.
example_zh: 他穿著短褲和T恤去海灘。

example: You should drink more water every day to stay healthy.
example_zh: 你應該每天多喝水以保持健康。

example: She carried her heavy bag on her left shoulder.
example_zh: 她用左肩背著她沉重的包包。

example: Please do not shout inside the library or classroom.
example_zh: 請不要在圖書館或教室裡喊叫。

example: She will show us her new painting tomorrow.
example_zh: 她明天會向我們展示她的新畫作。

example: He takes a hot shower every morning before work.
example_zh: 他每天早上上班前都會沖個熱水澡。

example: We ordered fried shrimp and rice at the restaurant.
example_zh: 我們在餐廳點了炸蝦和白飯。

example: Please shut the door quietly when you leave tonight.
example_zh: 請在你今晚離開時輕輕關上門。

example: The shy girl sat alone in the corner quietly.
example_zh: 那個害羞的女孩安靜地獨自坐在角落。

example: She stayed home because she felt sick all day.
example_zh: 她因為整天感到不舒服而待在家裡。

example: There is a small garden on the side of the house.
example_zh: 房子旁邊有一個小花園。

example: The children walked to school on the sidewalk together.
example_zh: 孩子們一起走在人行道上去上學。

example: The colorful sunset was a beautiful sight to see.
example_zh: 五彩繽紛的夕陽是一道美麗的景象。

example: He signed his name at the bottom of the paper.
example_zh: 他在文件的底部簽上了自己的名字。

example: The library was full of silence during exam week.
example_zh: 考試週期間圖書館裡一片沉默。

example: Everyone was silent when the teacher entered the classroom.
example_zh: 老師進入教室時，所有人都沉默了。

example: The kids laughed at the silly jokes in the show.
example_zh: 孩子們看著節目裡的愚蠢笑話哈哈大笑。

example: She wore a beautiful silver necklace to the party.
example_zh: 她戴著一條漂亮的銀項鍊去派對。

example: My sister and I have similar taste in music.
example_zh: 我姐姐和我對音樂有相似的品味。

example: This recipe is simple and easy to follow at home.
example_zh: 這個食譜簡單，在家很容易跟著做。

example: She has lived in Taipei since she was a child.
example_zh: 她從小就住在台北了。

example: He gave a sincere apology after hurting her feelings.
example_zh: 他在傷害她的感情後，真誠地道了歉。

example: The children love to sing songs in music class.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在音樂課上唱歌。

example: My favorite singer is performing in the city tonight.
example_zh: 我最喜歡的歌手今晚在市區演出。

example: There is a single tree in the middle of the park.
example_zh: 公園中央有一棵單獨的樹。

example: Please wash the dirty dishes in the kitchen sink.
example_zh: 請在廚房水槽裡洗那些髒碗盤。

example: Excuse me, sir, you left your bag on the chair.
example_zh: 打擾了，先生，您把包包忘在椅子上了。

example: My sister and I go shopping together every weekend.
example_zh: 我和姊妹每個週末都會一起去購物。

example: Please sit down and wait for your name to be called.
example_zh: 請坐下來等候叫到您的名字。

example: I need to be at the train station by six o'clock.
example_zh: 我需要在六點前到達火車站。

example: Can I try this jacket in a larger size, please?
example_zh: 請問這件夾克可以試穿大一號的嗎？

example: We went to skate on the ice rink last Saturday.
example_zh: 我們上週六去溜冰場溜冰。

example: She learned to ski during her winter vacation in Japan.
example_zh: 她在日本冬季假期學會了滑雪。

example: Cooking is a useful skill that everyone should learn.
example_zh: 烹飪是一項每個人都應該學習的實用技能。

example: You should put sunscreen on your skin every day.
example_zh: 你每天都應該在皮膚上塗防曬霜。

example: The skinny cat looked like it needed more food.
example_zh: 那隻皮包骨的貓看起來需要更多食物。

example: She wore a blue skirt to the party last night.
example_zh: 她昨晚穿著一條藍色裙子去參加派對。

example: The sky is very clear and blue today.
example_zh: 今天的天空非常清澈蔚藍。

example: You should sleep at least eight hours every night.
example_zh: 你每晚至少應該睡八個小時。

example: I feel sleepy because I stayed up too late.
example_zh: 我感到很想睡，因為我太晚睡了。

example: The slender model walked slowly across the stage.
example_zh: 那位身材苗條的模特兒緩緩走過舞台。

example: The little boy goes down the slide at the park.
example_zh: 那個小男孩在公園裡玩溜滑梯。

example: She stays slim by eating healthy food and exercising.
example_zh: 她靠著健康飲食和運動保持苗條身材。

example: Be careful not to slip on the wet floor.
example_zh: 小心不要在濕滑的地板上滑倒。

example: I wear my slippers when I walk around the house.
example_zh: 我在家裡走動時會穿拖鞋。

example: The slow train stopped at every station along the way.
example_zh: 這班慢車在沿途每個站都停下來。

example: She lives in a small but cozy apartment in town.
example_zh: 她住在鎮上一間小而溫馨的公寓。

example: Tom is a smart student who always gets good grades.
example_zh: 湯姆是個聰明的學生，總是得到好成績。

example: The fresh flowers smell wonderful in the morning air.
example_zh: 清晨空氣中的新鮮花朵聞起來非常好聞。

example: She always smiles when she sees her best friend.
example_zh: 她看到最好的朋友時總是會微笑。

example: My father used to smoke cigarettes every day after work.
example_zh: 我父親以前每天下班後都會抽煙。

example: I eat a small snack when I feel hungry at school.
example_zh: 我在學校感到餓的時候會吃一點點心。

example: The snail moved very slowly across the wet garden path.
example_zh: 那隻蝸牛非常緩慢地爬過潮濕的花園小路。

example: We saw a long green snake hiding under the rock.
example_zh: 我們看到一條長長的綠色蛇藏在岩石下面。

example: He bought a new pair of sneakers for gym class.
example_zh: 他買了一雙新的運動鞋來上體育課。

example: The sneaky cat quietly took the fish from the table.
example_zh: 那隻鬼祟的貓悄悄地從桌上偷走了魚。

example: It snowed heavily last night, so school was closed today.
example_zh: 昨晚下了很大的雪，所以今天學校停課了。

example: The children built a big snowman in the yard together.
example_zh: 孩子們一起在院子裡堆了一個大雪人。

example: It was a cold and snowy morning when we woke up.
example_zh: 我們醒來時，那是一個寒冷下雪的早晨。

example: She was so tired that she fell asleep on the bus.

example_zh: 我媽媽用嫩豆腐做了一道美味的湯。

example: The whole family cooked dinner together on Sunday evening.
example_zh: 全家人在星期天晚上一起煮晚餐。

example: Please remember to flush the toilet after you use it.
example_zh: 請記得使用廁所後要沖水。

example: She added a fresh tomato to her salad for lunch.
example_zh: 她在午餐的沙拉裡加了一顆新鮮的番茄。

example: We are going to the beach tomorrow morning together.
example_zh: 我們明天早上要一起去海灘。

example: The spicy food burned his tongue a little bit.
example_zh: 辣的食物讓他的舌頭有點燙。

example: My family is having dinner together tonight at home.
example_zh: 我的家人今晚要在家一起吃晚飯。

example: I like coffee, and I enjoy green tea too.
example_zh: 我喜歡咖啡，我也喜歡綠茶。

example: He used a special tool to fix the bicycle.
example_zh: 他用一個特殊的工具修好了腳踏車。

example: She went to the dentist because her tooth hurt.
example_zh: 她去看牙醫，因為她的牙齒很痛。

example: You should replace your toothbrush every three months.
example_zh: 你應該每三個月更換一支新的牙刷。

example: The cat climbed to the top of the tree.
example_zh: 那隻貓爬到了樹的頂端。

example: The main topic of today's class is wild animals.
example_zh: 今天課堂的主要主題是野生動物。

example: The total cost of the groceries was fifty dollars.
example_zh: 那些雜貨的總費用是五十元。

example: Please do not touch the paintings in the museum.
example_zh: 請不要觸摸博物館裡的畫作。

example: She walked toward the park to meet her friend.
example_zh: 她朝向公園走去，去見她的朋友。

example: He used a clean towel to dry his hands.
example_zh: 他用一條乾淨的毛巾擦乾雙手。

example: We could see the whole city from the tall tower.
example_zh: 我們可以從那座高塔看到整座城市。

example: My grandmother lives in a small quiet town.
example_zh: 我的祖母住在一個安靜的小鎮裡。

example: The little girl got a new toy for her birthday.
example_zh: 那個小女孩在生日時得到了一個新玩具。

example: The police are trying to trace the missing child.
example_zh: 警察正在努力追蹤那名失蹤的孩子。

example: The two countries trade food and technology with each other.
example_zh: 這兩個國家互相交易食物和科技產品。

example: There is heavy traffic on the road every morning.
example_zh: 每天早上道路上都有嚴重的交通堵塞。

example: She takes the train to work every day.
example_zh: 她每天搭火車去上班。

example: The hunter set a trap to catch the wild animal.
example_zh: 獵人設了一個陷阱來捕捉野生動物。

example: Please throw the trash into the bin over there.
example_zh: 請把垃圾丟進那邊的垃圾桶。

example: I want to travel to Japan with my family someday.
example_zh: 我希望有一天能和家人一起去日本旅行。

example: You should always treat other people with kindness and respect.
example_zh: 你應該永遠以善意和尊重對待他人。

example: The children like to play under the big old tree.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在那棵大老樹下玩耍。

example: A triangle has three sides and three angles inside it.
example_zh: 三角形有三條邊和三個內角。

example: The magician showed us a clever trick with some cards.
example_zh: 魔術師用幾張牌向我們展示了一個巧妙的把戲。

example: Our class is planning a trip to the science museum.
example_zh: 我們班正在計畫一趟參觀科學博物館的旅行。

example: He got into trouble because he forgot to do his homework.
example_zh: 他因為忘記做作業而惹上了麻煩。

example: The big truck carries heavy boxes to the store.
example_zh: 那輛大卡車把沉重的箱子運到商店。

example: It is true that eating vegetables is good for you.
example_zh: 吃蔬菜對你有益，這是真的。

example: She plays the trumpet in the school band every week.
example_zh: 她每週在學校樂團裡吹喇叭。

example: You can trust your best friend to keep a secret.
example_zh: 你可以信任你的好朋友來保守秘密。

example: Always tell the truth, even when it is difficult.
example_zh: 即使困難，也要說出真相。

example: Please try the new dish; it tastes really good.
example_zh: 請嘗試這道新菜，它真的很好吃。

example: He wore a blue T-shirt to the beach yesterday.
example_zh: 他昨天穿了一件藍色T恤去海灘。

example: The children like to play with toys in the tub.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在浴缸裡玩玩具。

example: We have an English class every Tuesday afternoon at school.
example_zh: 我們每週二下午在學校上英語課。

example: The train goes through a long tunnel in the mountain.
example_zh: 火車穿過山中一條長長的隧道。

example: My family always eats turkey together on Thanksgiving Day.
example_zh: 我的家人總是在感恩節一起吃火雞。

example: Please turn left at the next traffic light ahead.
example_zh: 請在前方下一個紅綠燈左轉。

example: The small turtle slowly walks along the sandy beach.
example_zh: 小烏龜沿著沙灘緩緩地爬行。

example: I brushed my teeth twice today, morning and night.
example_zh: 我今天刷了兩次牙，早上和晚上各一次。

example: She has two younger brothers who go to primary school.
example_zh: 她有兩個弟弟在讀小學。

example: What type of music do you like best?
example_zh: 你最喜歡哪種類型的音樂？

example: The typhoon brought strong winds and heavy rain yesterday.
example_zh: 颱風昨天帶來了強風和大雨。

example: The ugly old building was torn down last year.
example_zh: 那棟醜陋的舊建築去年被拆除了。

example: She forgot her umbrella and got wet in the rain.
example_zh: 她忘了帶雨傘，在雨中淋濕了。

example: My uncle lives in Taipei and works at a bank.
example_zh: 我叔叔住在台北，在銀行工作。

example: The cat is sleeping under the big wooden table.
example_zh: 那隻貓正在大木桌下面睡覺。

example: Please underline the key words in each sentence carefully.
example_zh: 請仔細在每個句子的關鍵字下面畫底線。

example: I don't understand this math problem, can you help?
example_zh: 我不了解這道數學題，你能幫我嗎？

example: She bought new underwear at the department store today.
example_zh: 她今天在百貨公司買了新的內衣。

example: He felt unhappy because he lost his favorite toy.
example_zh: 他因為弄丟了最喜歡的玩具而感到不快樂。

example: All students must wear their school uniform every day.
example_zh: 所有學生每天都必須穿制服。

example: Scientists are still learning many new things about the universe.
example_zh: 科學家仍在不斷學習關於宇宙的新事物。

example: She studied hard to get into a good university.
example_zh: 她努力讀書，以進入一所好大學。

example: We waited until the rain stopped before going outside.
example_zh: 我們等到雨停了才出去。

example: The little girl looked up and saw a rainbow.
example_zh: 小女孩抬頭向上看，看見了一道彩虹。

example: Once upon a time, a girl lived in a small house.
example_zh: 從前，有一個女孩住在一間小房子裡。

example: My bedroom is upstairs, next to the bathroom.
example_zh: 我的臥室在樓上，就在浴室旁邊。

example: The teacher asked us to finish the homework today.
example_zh: 老師要求我們今天完成作業。

example: I use my phone to check the weather every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上用手機查天氣。

example: A good map is very useful when you travel alone.
example_zh: 一張好地圖在你獨自旅行時非常有用。

example: She sat in her usual seat at the front.
example_zh: 她坐在前面她平常的座位上。

example: I usually wake up at seven o'clock on weekdays.
example_zh: 我平日通常在七點鐘醒來。

example: We went to the beach during our summer vacation.
example_zh: 我們在暑假期間去了海邊。

example: The small village is located in a green valley.
example_zh: 這個小村莊位於一個綠色的山谷中。

example: This old watch is very valuable because it belonged to grandpa.
example_zh: 這隻舊手錶非常貴重，因為它是爺爺的。

example: Good health has more value than money or wealth.
example_zh: 良好的健康比金錢或財富更有價值。

example: My mother cooks a vegetable soup every Sunday morning.
example_zh: 我媽媽每個星期天早上都煮蔬菜湯。

example: The vendor sold fresh fruit at the street market.
example_zh: 小販在街市販賣新鮮水果。

example: The weather today is very hot and quite humid.
example_zh: 今天的天氣非常炎熱而且相當潮濕。

example: He wore a blue vest over his white shirt.
example_zh: 他在白色襯衫外面穿了一件藍色背心。

example: The team celebrated their victory with a big party.
example_zh: 這支隊伍舉辦了一場盛大的派對來慶祝他們的勝利。

example: She watched a funny video on her phone last night.
example_zh: 她昨晚在手機上看了一段有趣的影片。

example: My grandparents live in a small village near the mountains.
example_zh: 我的祖父母住在山邊的一個小村莊裡。

example: She has been playing the violin since she was six.
example_zh: 她從六歲開始就一直在學拉小提琴。

example: We plan to visit our cousins during the summer holiday.
example_zh: 我們計畫在暑假期間去拜訪我們的表兄弟姐妹。

example: Every visitor must sign their name at the front desk.
example_zh: 每位訪客都必須在前台簽名。

example: Reading books every day helps you build a strong vocabulary.
example_zh: 每天閱讀書籍能幫助你建立豐富的字彙量。

example: The teacher has a clear voice that everyone can hear.
example_zh: 這位老師的聲音很清晰，每個人都能聽到。

example: We play volleyball on the beach every Sunday afternoon.
example_zh: 我們每個星期天下午都在海灘打排球。

example: Citizens should vote to choose their country's next leader.
example_zh: 公民應該投票選出他們國家的下一位領導人。

example: Please wait here and I will be back in five minutes.
example_zh: 請在這裡等候，我五分鐘後就回來。

example: The waiter brought our food to the table very quickly.
example_zh: 服務生很快地把我們的餐點送到桌上。

example: The waitress smiled and asked if we needed anything else.
example_zh: 女服務生微笑著問我們是否還需要其他東西。

example: My mom wakes me up at seven every school morning.
example_zh: 我媽媽每天上學的早晨都在七點叫醒我。

example: We walk to the park together after dinner every evening.
example_zh: 我們每天晚飯後一起走路去公園。

example: The children drew colorful pictures on the white wall.
example_zh: 孩子們在白色的牆上畫了彩色的圖畫。

example: He left his wallet on the table after lunch.
example_zh: 他午餐後把皮夾忘在桌上了。

example: She wants to visit Japan during the summer vacation.
example_zh: 她想在暑假期間去日本旅遊。

example: The war caused many people to leave their homes.
example_zh: 戰爭讓許多人不得不離開家園。

example: The warm sunshine made us feel happy and relaxed.
example_zh: 溫暖的陽光讓我們感到開心又放鬆。

example: Please wash your hands before you eat your meal.
example_zh: 吃飯前請先洗手。

example: Don't waste food because many people do not have enough.
example_zh: 不要浪費食物，因為很多人沒有足夠的東西吃。

example: We watched an exciting football game on TV last night.
example_zh: 我們昨晚在電視上看了一場精彩的足球賽。

example: You should drink enough water every day to stay healthy.
example_zh: 你每天應該喝足夠的水來保持健康。

example: The waterfall in the forest is beautiful and very tall.
example_zh: 森林裡的瀑布很美，而且非常高。

example: We eat cold watermelon on hot summer days.
example_zh: 我們在炎熱的夏天吃冰涼的西瓜。

example: She waved goodbye to her friends at the school gate.
example_zh: 她在校門口向朋友們揮手道別。

example: Can you show me the way to the train station?
example_zh: 你能告訴我去火車站的路怎麼走嗎？

example: We go to the park every Sunday morning together.
example_zh: 我們每個星期天早上一起去公園。

example: She felt weak after staying in bed for three days.
example_zh: 她臥病在床三天後感到很虛弱。

example: She wears a red coat every day in winter.
example_zh: 她每天冬天都穿一件紅色外套。

example: The weather today is sunny and very warm outside.
example_zh: 今天的天氣晴朗，外面非常溫暖。

example: You can find many useful recipes on this website.
example_zh: 你可以在這個網站上找到很多有用的食譜。

example: We have an English class every Wednesday afternoon.
example_zh: 我們每個星期三下午都有英語課。

example: I study English for one hour every week.
example_zh: 我每週學習英語一個小時。

example: My father goes to work on every weekday morning.
example_zh: 我父親每個平日早晨都去上班。

example: Our family usually goes hiking together on the weekend.
example_zh: 我們家通常在週末一起去健行。

example: The weight of this bag is about five kilograms.
example_zh: 這個袋子的重量大約是五公斤。

example: The teacher welcomed all the new students with a smile.
example_zh: 老師微笑著歡迎所有的新同學。

example: She speaks English very well after years of practice.
example_zh: 她經過多年練習後，英語說得非常好。

example: The sun always sets in the west every evening.
example_zh: 太陽每天傍晚都在西方落下。

example: My shoes got wet because I walked in the rain.
example_zh: 我的鞋子因為在雨中行走而濕了。

example: The whale swam slowly near the surface of the ocean.
example_zh: 那隻鯨魚緩緩地在海面附近游動。

example: What do you usually eat for breakfast in the morning?
example_zh: 你早上通常早餐吃什麼？

example: The front wheel of my bicycle is broken and flat.
example_zh: 我腳踏車的前輪壞掉而且漏氣了。

example: Do you know when the next bus will arrive?
example_zh: 你知道下一班公車什麼時候到嗎？

example: Can you tell me where the nearest supermarket is?
example_zh: 你能告訴我最近的超市在哪裡嗎？

example: I am not sure whether she will come to the party.
example_zh: 我不確定她是否會來派對。

example: Which color do you like better, red or blue?
example_zh: 你比較喜歡哪個顏色，紅色還是藍色？

example: She listened to music while she was cooking dinner.
example_zh: 她在煮晚餐的時候聽音樂。

example: The little girl wore a white dress to the party.
example_zh: 那個小女孩穿著白色洋裝去派對。

example: Do you know who left this bag on the table?
example_zh: 你知道是誰把這個袋子留在桌上嗎？

example: He ate the whole pizza by himself in ten minutes.
example_zh: 他一個人在十分鐘內吃了整個披薩。

example: The teacher asked whose book was left on the floor.
example_zh: 老師問是誰的書留在地板上。

example: Can you explain why you were late for school today?
example_zh: 你能解釋你今天為什麼上學遲到嗎？

example: The wide road made it easy for cars to pass.
example_zh: 寬闊的道路讓車輛容易通行。

example: His wife cooks a delicious meal every Sunday evening.
example_zh: 他的妻子每個星期天晚上都會煮美味的晚餐。

example: She will visit her grandmother this coming weekend.
example_zh: 她這個週末將要去拜訪她的祖母。

example: Our school team worked hard to win the basketball game.
example_zh: 我們學校的隊伍努力贏得了籃球比賽。

example: The strong wind blew all the leaves off the tree.
example_zh: 強風把樹上所有的葉子都吹落了。

example: She opened the window to let in fresh air.
example_zh: 她打開窗戶，讓新鮮空氣進來。

example: It was too windy to fly a kite outside.
example_zh: 外面風太大，不適合放風箏。

example: My parents drink a glass of wine at dinner.
example_zh: 我的父母在晚餐時喝一杯酒。

example: The bird hurt its wing and could not fly.
example_zh: 那隻鳥傷了翅膀，無法飛翔。

example: The winner of the race received a gold medal.
example_zh: 比賽的勝利者獲得了一枚金牌。

example: We wear thick coats to stay warm in winter.
example_zh: 我們在冬天穿厚外套保暖。

example: It is wise to save money for the future.
example_zh: 為未來存錢是明智之舉。

example: She made a wish when she blew out the candles.
example_zh: 她吹蠟燭時許了一個願望。

example: He went to the park with his little sister.
example_zh: 他和他的小妹妹一起去公園。

example: I cannot sleep well without a quiet room.
example_zh: 沒有安靜的房間，我無法好好睡覺。

example: She cooked the vegetables quickly in a hot wok.
example_zh: 她在熱鍋中快速炒了蔬菜。

example: The wolf lives in the forest and hunts at night.
example_zh: 狼住在森林裡，在夜間獵食。

example: The woman in the red dress is my teacher.
example_zh: 穿紅色裙子的那位女人是我的老師。

example: I wonder why the sky is blue every day.
example_zh: 我想知道為什麼天空每天都是藍色的。

example: We had a wonderful time at the beach last summer.
example_zh: 我們去年夏天在海灘度過了美好的時光。

example: The old table is made of dark brown wood.
example_zh: 那張舊桌子是由深棕色木頭製成的。

example: I did not understand every word in the story.
example_zh: 我沒有理解故事裡的每一個字。

example: She goes to work by bus every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上搭公車去上班。

example: The factory worker starts his shift at seven.
example_zh: 那位工廠工人七點開始他的班。

example: She wants to travel around the world someday.
example_zh: 她希望有一天能環遊世界。

example: Don't worry about the test; you will do fine.
example_zh: 別擔心考試，你一定會表現得很好的。

example: This movie is worth watching with your family.
example_zh: 這部電影值得和家人一起觀看。

example: He said he would call me after dinner.
example_zh: 他說他晚餐後會打電話給我。

example: The doctor cleaned the wound and put on a bandage.
example_zh: 醫生清理了傷口並幫他包紮了繃帶。

example: She wore a beautiful gold bracelet on her wrist.
example_zh: 她的手腕上戴著一條漂亮的金手鐲。

example: Please write your name and phone number here.
example_zh: 請在這裡寫下你的姓名和電話號碼。

example: My favorite writer published a new book last year.
example_zh: 我最喜歡的作家去年出版了一本新書。

example: I took the wrong bus and got lost.
example_zh: 我搭錯了公車，結果迷路了。

example: The children are playing in the yard after school.
example_zh: 放學後，孩子們在院子裡玩耍。

example: We visit our grandparents at least twice a year.
example_zh: 我們每年至少拜訪祖父母兩次。

example: She wore a yellow dress to the party last night.
example_zh: 她昨晚穿著黃色的洋裝去參加派對。

example: Yes, I would like some more tea, thank you.
example_zh: 是的，我想再來點茶，謝謝你。

example: I went to the market with my mom yesterday.
example_zh: 我昨天和我媽媽一起去市場。

example: I have not finished my homework yet, sorry.
example_zh: 我還沒完成我的作業，抱歉。

example: You should drink more water every single day.
example_zh: 你每天都應該多喝水。

example: She is too young to watch that scary movie.
example_zh: 她太年輕了，不適合看那部恐怖電影。

example: Please put your bag on the chair over there.
example_zh: 請把你的包包放在那邊的椅子上。

example: This blue pen is yours, not mine, I think.
example_zh: 我認為這支藍色的筆是你的，不是我的。

example: You should take care of yourself when you are sick.
example_zh: 當你生病的時候，你應該好好照顧自己。

example: She spent her youth playing music in the park.
example_zh: 她在公園裡演奏音樂度過了她的青春。

example: The chocolate cake from that bakery is really yummy.
example_zh: 那家烘焙坊的巧克力蛋糕真的非常美味。

example: The zebra has black and white stripes on its body.
example_zh: 斑馬的身上有黑白相間的條紋。

example: The temperature dropped to zero degrees last winter night.
example_zh: 去年冬天晚上氣溫降到了零度。

example: We saw many animals at the zoo on Sunday.
example_zh: 我們週日在動物園看到了很多動物。
